programme.title: Andromeda: Den ukontrable mannen
programme.desc: Sett i et alternativt univers der Dylan døde og Gaheris Rhade prøver å reformere Commonwealth.

programme.title: Andromeda: Delenda Est
programme.desc: Gruppen som angrep Andromeda under den første undertegningen av Commonwealth-charteret, vender tilbake til mer kaos.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Dark Backward
programme.desc: Trance går gjennom noen forskjellige scenarier og prøver å finne en der mannskapet hennes ikke dør.

programme.title: Mutant X: No Exit
programme.desc: En mutant som har muligheten til å feste med hvilken som helst datamaskin med tankene sine, som er lammet etter et møte med teamet, tar over Sanctuarys datamaskiner.

programme.title: Mutant X: Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Mutant X-teamet lærer om Lexas fremmede tvillingbror når han blir hovedmålet for en underjordisk operasjon som høster mutante organer.

programme.title: Mutant X: Possibilities
programme.desc: Brennan og Mutant X-teamet slår seg sammen med en tidsreisende mutant for å spre en bombe som truer ødeleggende konsekvenser.

programme.title: Mutant X: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: Mens Brennan og Shalimar etterforsker en mystisk flyulykke, tenker Lexa på fremtiden sin med Mutant X-teamet.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Devil Doll
programme.desc: En guide fører Sydney og Nigel til et uvanlig, underjordisk aztekisk gravkammer. I stedet for en kropp finner de en relikvie.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Incognito
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel henter en mytisk lansett, og støter på Nigels likhet like før hans død. Nigel får et kutt fra lansetten. Senere overtaler Cate Nigel til å etterligne mannen.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: All Choked Up
programme.desc: Carson Inez, en samler, bruker et gammelt halskjede for å få Sydney til å hjelpe henne med å oppdra Athena, som deretter vil hjelpe henne med å erobre verden.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Warlock of Nu Theta Phi
programme.desc: Når Sydneys student Megs romkamerat finner en hekses amulett, innlegger det Meg. Meg's kjærestes brorskap bror løper for å få amuletten. Hva gjør han?

programme.title: Andromeda: The Risk-All Point
programme.desc: Et kraftigere Andromeda-skip eksploderer på grunn av sannsynlig sabotasje, og tvinger Dylans mannskap til å redde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den rette hesten
programme.desc: Beka setter både mannskapet og en hel planet i fare når en tidligere kjærlighet dukker opp.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hva skjer med en revidert utsatt?
programme.desc: Andromeda mottar et rop om hjelp fra pastor Bam.
programme.sub-title: Hva skjer med en revidert utsatt?

programme.title: Andromeda: Spydspunktet
programme.desc: Etter at en Commonwealth-planet er angrepet av pyriske pyroformere, blir Dylan tvunget til å kjempe for å beskytte den nye planeten.

programme.title: Mutant X: Art of Attraction
programme.desc: Mens Mutant X-teamet kjemper for å hente en formel gjemt i en samling kunstverk, får Shalimar viktig informasjon fra en mystisk kilde.

programme.title: Mutant X: A Normal Life
programme.desc: Mutant X sporer opp en useriøs forsker mens Shalimar bryter seg bort fra teamet for å hjelpe Adam med å redde forskeren - og avdekke den virkelige dårlige fyren.

programme.title: Mutant X: Divided Loyalties
programme.desc: Brennan blir tvunget til å gå tilbake til sin kriminelle fortid når Mutant X oppdager at hans gamle partner er involvert i å stjele hemmeligheter fra Dominion.

programme.title: Mutant X: Age of Innocence
programme.desc: Mutant X avdekker et gammelt militært eksperiment som involverer et aldersreverseringsserum og er overrasket over å oppdage at bestefaren til Jesse er en av testpersonene.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fire in the Sky
programme.desc: Mens Sydney holder foredrag om indianerne som møtte en mystisk katastrofe 600 år tidligere, gir en innfødt henne en relikvie fra den tiden. Hva er hemmeligheten?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: This time, the chefs must prepare a Greek meal each choosing a protein as a basis for their dish. Meanwhile, Josh gives himself a motivational speech after being singled out for his lack of leadership.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Today, the chefs must create a dish using an alcohol - either beer, wine or a spirit. Judging the dishes along with Gordon are a couple of guest bartenders. Meanwhile, a slipped disc threatens Bret's progress.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Today, the chefs are faced with a selection of exotic protein foods and have to try to grab what they want to use for their dish, including alligator, wild boar and ostrich.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Today's challenge is to prepare a homecoming dinner for the Calabasas High School with the theme of Mardi Gras using seafood, chicken and beef.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The team that identifies the most foods in a blind taste test wins a shopping spree. During dinner service, the chefs present a five-course meal for two charitable organisations.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants must find keys for lockers containing various cuts of steak, then prepare a delicious dish in under 35 minutes. Dinner service sees the return of steak night.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay puts aspiring chefs through a series of gruelling challenges. Pairs of contestants battle it out in the 'Taste It and Make It' challenge, with the winning duo visiting the Queen Mary ocean liner.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The top five chefs prepare a unique and elegant small-plate dish in under 45 minutes for people attending a private symphony performance, for which the challenge winner earns a private helicopter tour of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs who prepare the best vegetarian dish win a parasailing experience and a slap-up meal. Emotions run high as the hopefuls receive a visit from their friends and family.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The 14th series of Gordon Ramsay's fiercely fought chef challenge concludes. The top two chefs visit previous winner Christina Wilson in Las Vegas for some motivation, before preparing five dishes to be judged by top chefs.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay puts 18 more hopeful chefs through their paces. Will they impress by putting together their signature dishes in just 45 minutes?
programme.sub-title: When the Wall Comes Tumbling Down

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants race in the first annual Crêpe Grand Prix challenge for the chance to win a luxurious dining experience.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Tensions run high as the teams are challenged to make eight unique dishes using a selection of ostrich cuts.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants compete in a surf and turf protein relay for the chance to win a day of surfing in San Diego.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A shock elimination forces both teams to regroup. Guitarist Joe Perry and singer Estelle are among the dinner guests.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants take part in an ingredient crossword challenge. Kid-friendly items must be incorporated into dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining contestants are tasked with cooking their own version of a southern staple, to be judged by chef Chris Hastings.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams prepare special menu items for the International Ballroom Invitational; the winners go kayaking in the Pacific Ocean and have lunch at the Lark; the losers prepare a raw bar for the ballroom event.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining contestants are challenged to taste puréed baby food, with the winning team enjoying massages and a nice lunch.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The newly reformed teams try to impress their celebrity diners, but another tough dinner service leads to a shocking elimination.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: Gutta er i Italia for å ta en nervepirrende kjøretur gjennom Roma sentrum, teste superbiler og besøke den legendariske Imola-banen.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 2
programme.desc: En titt på Kinas ekspanderende motorindustri, NASCAR-racing i Texas, og en test av en Mercedes SLS Roadster. Med Matt Le Blanc.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 3
programme.desc: Gutta tar over filmingen av filmen Sweeneys dramatiske biljakt, og Hollywood-skuespilleren Ryan Reynolds er ukens kjendis i en billigbil.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond og James May går i gang med et ambisiøst prosjekt for å bygge mobilitetsscootere som kan takle veiene på den britiske landsbygda.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson og James May hyller den avdøde svenske bilprodusenten Saab. Richard Hammond racer en rakettdrevet flygende mann mot en rallybygd Skoda.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 6
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond og James May drar til Donington i tre demonterte banebiler. Jeremy gjenskaper Slaget om Storbritannia med en Bentley med flymotor.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond og James May forsøker å finne ut om du kan drive motorsport for mindre enn det koster å spille golf. Slash og F1-fører Kimi Raikkonen er gjester.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jeremy bygger en bil som er enda mindre enn den berømte Peel P50, og framlegger så konseptet for de fryktinngytende entreprenørene i Dragons' Den.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 2
programme.desc: I USA setter Top Gear-gutta kursen mot grensen til Mexico i en Lexus LFA, en Dodge Viper og en Aston Martin Vanquish.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 3
programme.desc: Gutta arrangerer et race fra Wembley til San Siro i Milano. Jeremy kjører en Shelby Mustang GT500, og Richard og James reiser med tog.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Jeremy får hjelp av noen kjendisvenner til å teste den nye Kia Cee'd, og F1-stjernen Lewis Hamilton er ukens kjendis i en billigbil.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jeremy og Richard prøver å skape en bil for de eldre, og James tester en ny Range Rover.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Del 2 av 2. Trioen har overlevd intens trafikk, livsfarlige leirskred og heller tvilsom kartlesing, og når høydepunktet på reisen for å finne Nilens utspring.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson og James May kappkjører med en bil og en superyacht i et nervepirrende løp langs den vakre kysten av New Zealand helt opp til spissen av Nordøya.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 2
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson tester den sensasjonelle Ferrari F12 med 730 hestekrefter i det vidåpne landskapet i Skottland. Richard Hammond kombinerer motorsport og drosjer.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 605
programme.desc: Fru Tishell vender tilbake til landsbyen. Martin må finne ut hva som er i veien med Lorna. Al og Morwenna har en dårlig date, og kjærligheten blomstrer mellom Bert og Jennifer.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 606
programme.desc: Hypokondrieren Malcolm Rayner sliter med pusten og Martin spør ham om han noen gang har jobbet med asbest.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 607
programme.desc: Al får besøk av to militære politimenn som prøver å spore opp barnevakten James, Mike Pruddy.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 608
programme.desc: Louisa drar til Spania, Bert og Jennifer forlovelsesfest ender med et smell, og Al blir hyllet som en helt for å ha reddet Carolines liv.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 701
programme.desc: Martin vender tilbake til Portwenn, men uten Louisa som har dratt for å bo hos moren sin i Spania.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 702
programme.desc: Louisas retur reiser ytterligere spørsmål om forholdet deres, og kanskje de trenger å tilbringe mer tid fra hverandre.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 703
programme.desc: Etter en ny katastrofe på restauranten hans tar Bert drastiske grep og forsvinner, noe som fører til at Al kontakter P.C. Penhale, selv om han er mer interessert i å flørte med Louisas barnevakt Janice.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa og Martin har sin første terapiøkt sammen, og ingen av dem var forberedt på å få hjemmelekser.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 705
programme.desc: Louisa og Morwenna overtaler Martin til å finne et nytt hjem til Buddy. Martin er ikke spesielt imponert over Angelas alternative tilnærming til medisin.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 706
programme.desc: Louisa hjelper ekskjæresten Danny når han tar med seg syv barn fra London for å bo på Ruths gård - overvåket av Al og Bert - mens hun og Martin planlegger en date etter råd fra dr. Timoney.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 707
programme.desc: Louisa er ikke veldig fornøyd når hennes nye kunstlærer Erica vil teste noen ganske alternative ideer på barna, mens dr. Timoney blir involvert i en bilulykke utenfor skolen.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa og Martin bestemmer seg for å prøve seg på et forhold, og starter med en forsonende middag, men Louisa er bekymret når Martin ikke klarer å dukke opp.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 801
programme.desc: Forberedelsene til Janice og Penhales bryllup fortsetter, noe som gjør Portwenn gal og Louisa og Martin har flyttet sammen igjen.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 901
programme.desc: En representant fra en medisinsk forening kommer for å vurdere Martin og hans helsestasjon.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 902
programme.desc: Martin blir tvunget til å gjøre et par oppfriskningskurs, mens Louisa starter en ny karriere.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 903
programme.desc: Louisa planlegger en spesiell kveld for Martins bursdag, men det går ikke som planlagt på grunn av AIs overraskelsesfest.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 904
programme.desc: Martin får sin andre vurdering fra legeforeningen, og Buddy forsvinner sporløst. Penhale blir opprørt når hans etterfølger, Mark Mylow, ankommer og prøver å ta over.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 905
programme.desc: Noen har blitt skutt. Penhale starter en etterforskning for å finne gjerningspersonen.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 906
programme.desc: Martin og Louisa har sin første fertilitetsavtale, mens Penhale reagerer på et tilfelle av hærverk og får en gratis surfeleksjon.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Hemmeligheter og koner
programme.desc: Etter at Lexi tar kontroll over Coopers kontoer, beskylder han Michael for å fortelle henne om de skjulte aktivaene.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Et skudd i mørket
programme.desc: Peter erklærer sin kjærlighet til Lexi, og hun flytter inn hos ham. Jennifer hjelper Crai med å selge Mancini Glove.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Skalpellkvinnens angrep
programme.desc: Etter at Cooper slipper ut av fengsel, følger Megan ham rundt og oppdager at Kimberlys mor står bak drapsforsøket på Michael.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Min lille komajente
programme.desc: Cooper fortsetter å våke ved sengekanten mens Megan er i koma. Men en sjalu Michael prøver å stoppe besøkene etter en følelse av déjà vu.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Alle drar til Kyle
programme.desc: Billy og Samantha drar på bryllupsreise til Hawaii, mens Connie får en vikarjobb ved Amanda Woodward Advertising og bestemmer seg for å bli i Los Angeles.

programme.title: Melrose Place: En lyd i mørket
programme.desc: Etter å ha reddet Lexie, vender Peter tilbake til ulykkesstedet og finner en landstryker som Lexi kjørte på da hun kjørte Peters bil.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Et tre snakker i Melrose
programme.desc: Cooper avbryter Michaels jakt på Megan. Jennifer får også Cooper til å droppe søksmålet mot Michael.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Å drepe et helikopter
programme.desc: Etter å ha gjemt jazzklubbens julemidler, tar Taylor Kyle med på en helgetur til Las Vegas for å gamble og gjør et stort innhugg i gjelden.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Amanda er tilbake
programme.desc: Billy og Kyle presser et redningsteam til å sette i gang en leteaksjon etter Samantha og Amanda, som kan ha fått en alvorlig skade.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Ørkenens Kyle
programme.desc: Cooper og Megan går på date, og Michael prøver å gjøre det samme med stripperen Amber. Bob spiller sin hånd med Peter for å være med Lexi.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Nådestøtet
programme.desc: Lexis far viser sin forakt for Peter. Og Craig truer Jennifer etter at hun får vite om noen ikke-helt-lovlige kostnadskutt.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Mama Mia
programme.desc: Michael og Jennifers mor kommer på besøk og skremmer dem når Jennifer forteller moren at hun var forlovet med Craig.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Siste tog til Bagdad
programme.desc: Kyle og Amanda reiser til Santa Fe for å besøke ekskjæreten hans. Men komplikasjoner truer bryllupsdagen deres når Christine kommer til Los Angeles.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Et slag og en frue
programme.desc: Lexi flytter inn hos Cooper i Melrose og fortsetter å klandre Peter for farens død, på tross for at bevisene sier noe annet.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Stumpt drama
programme.desc: Peter blir innblandet i planen om å ødelegge forholdet til Amanda og Kyle når Christine spiller suicidal og tvinger ham til å få henne innlagt.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Christine på sporet
programme.desc: Etter at Nick og Taylor dreper Christine ved et uhell, legger de liket på togsporet og får det til å se ut som selvmord.

programme.title: Melrose Place: For romantisk for ord
programme.desc: Samantha og Billy har dårlig samvittighet angående flørtene med Jeff og Jennifer. Men lidenskap vipper dem av pinnen igjen når Jeff presser Samantha til å forlate Billy.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Fire forhold og et svangerskap
programme.desc: Michael vurderer drastiske midler angående klinikken. Men innblanding fra en sympatisk Megan får ham til å ombestemme seg.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Silkedrømmer
programme.desc: Walker og Trivette prøver å finne kilden til et dyrt og dødelig designerdop.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Mustanger
programme.desc: Walker prøver å arrestere bønder som planlegger å drepe en flokk villhester.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Til døden skiller oss
programme.desc: Walker prøver å redde et spedbarn som er fanget i en bil som vipper på kanten av en bro.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Regnbuekriger
programme.desc: I begravelsen innrømmer offerets sønn at farens død ikke var en ulykke.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Veien til Black Bayou
programme.desc: Legen gir Walker beskjed om å ta ferie, men den blir langt fra avslappende.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Skuddlinje
programme.desc: En korrupt politimann prøver å drepe Alex etter at hun mottar innsideinformasjon om at en gjeng politifolk i Dallas stjeler konfiskert narkotiske stoffer fra bevislageret og selger dem på svartebørsen.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Hevn
programme.desc: Det utloves en dusør på en million dollar for å drepe Cordell Walker.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Tigerøye
programme.desc: Texas Rangers prøver å redde en forretningsmanns datter som er kidnappet av en japansk gjeng.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Bingobedraget
programme.desc: Walker prøver å få et nøkkelvitne til å vitne så han kan få dømt en notorisk narkolanger.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Pengetog
programme.desc: Rangerne oppdager at to stuntmenn planlegger et togran.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Røffe gater
programme.desc: Når rangerne oppdager at en gruppe rike tenåringer banker om hjemløse i Dallas og filmer det hele, går Walker undercover for å fakke gjengen.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Cowboy
programme.desc: Når Alex blir kidnappet, må Walker og Trivette finne henne før hun blir drept.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Krigssone, del 1
programme.desc: Rangerne blir overrumplet av en rekke omtalte, multimillion-ran begått av menn i klovnemasker, men etterforskningen blir personlig når Walkers nære venn, ranger Logan Reno, blir drept.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Krigssone, del 2
programme.desc: Rangerne blir overrumplet av en rekke omtalte, multimillion-ran begått av menn i klovnemasker, men etterforskningen blir personlig når Walkers nære venn, ranger Logan Reno, blir drept.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Ikke stol på noen
programme.desc: Når fem millioner dollar forsvinner fra bevislageret, blir Trivette beskyldt for å ha stjålet dem.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Blåfilmer
programme.desc: Walker må være kreativ for å fakke en høyt respektert samfunnsleder.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: På hellig grunn
programme.desc: En gjeng unge cherokee-indianere går berserk og raner museer og stjeler artefakter.

programme.title: Taken 3
programme.desc: Eks-agenten Bryan Mills er forsont med sin tidligere kone, men lykken blir kortvarig når hun brutalt myrdes og han blir beskyldt for udåden.

programme.title: Fortress: Sniper's Eye
programme.desc: Den pensjonerte CIA-agenten Robert legger ut på en dristig redningsaksjon av erkefiendens enke, Sasha. Men snart blir Robert konfrontert med et kjent ansikt han trodde han aldri ville se igjen...

programme.title: Till Death
programme.desc: Etter en romantisk kveld i deres avsidesliggende hus, våkner Emma opp lenket til sin døde ektemann. Hun er fanget og isolert og må kjempe mot leiemordere for å unnslippe ektemannens avsindige plan.

programme.title: Official Secrets
programme.desc: Den sanne historien om en britisk varsler som lekket informasjon til media om en ulovlig NSA-operasjon, hvis formål var å presse FNs sikkerhetsråd til å godkjenne invasjonen av Irak i 2003.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: Når en amerikansk by blir invadert av nordkoreanske soldater, kommer en gruppe unge mennesker sammen for å beskytte hverandre, frigjøre byen og gjenvinne sin frihet.

programme.title: Taken
programme.desc: Den tidligere agenten Bryan Mills begynner de lengste 96 timene i sitt liv når han tar opp jakten på mennene som kidnappet datteren hans.

programme.title: Sweet Carolina
programme.desc: Josie vender tilbake til den lille hjembyen sin da hun uventet blir verge for niesen og nevøen sin. Der møter hun Cooper, kjæresten fra high school.

programme.title: Worth
programme.desc: Etter angrepene på World Trade Center og Pentagon utnevner kongressen advokaten Kenneth Feinberg til å lede erstatningsfondet for ofrene. Feinberg står overfor en umulig oppgave - å bestemme hvor mye et liv er verdt.

programme.title: Barely Lethal
programme.desc: 16-år gamle Megan Walsh er i trening for å bli en iskald internasjonal leiemorder, men i hemmelighet lengter hun etter å være en normal tenåring. Hun forfalsker derfor sin egen død.

programme.title: The Vows We Keep
programme.desc: En eventplanlegger finner kjærligheten mens hun jobber med å arrangere det siste bryllupet på en historisk taverna.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Party
programme.desc: Kris makes an unexpected but crucial discovery about her past when an old friend arrives.

programme.title: Wildfire: Identity
programme.desc: When she gets thrown off a horse and injured, Kris herself realizes that a career as a jockey might come at a high price.

programme.title: Wildfire: Tina Sharp
programme.desc: Kris turns to painkillers to cope with her injury when the possibility of riding in an upcoming race is contingent upon her getting better.

programme.title: Wildfire: Impressions
programme.desc: Kris and Junior are getting more serious as Junior invites Kris to have dinner with the Davis'.

programme.title: Wildfire: Loyalty
programme.desc: Kris is hired to ride Wildfire although she struggles to remain focused because of her relationship with Junior.

programme.title: Wildfire: Try It Without The Porsche
programme.desc: Kris meets Kerry Connelly, a sports agent who takes interest in Kris after the results of the Sandpiper Race.

programme.title: Wildfire: Opportunity Knocks
programme.desc: On the heels of her dramatic second place finish in the Sandpiper Race, Kris is offered an opportunity to star in a commercial with Wildfire, which unexpectedly thrusts Kris and Junior together.

programme.title: Wildfire: A Good Convict Is Hard To Find
programme.desc: Kris reluctantly returns to Camp LaGrange for an event at the Equestrian Center where she first met Wildfire.
programme.sub-title: A Good Convict Is Hard To Find

programme.title: Wildfire: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.desc: Kris is left alone in charge of Raintree when Jean goes on a trip with Charlie, Matt goes with Dani to help her look into a new racehorse, and Pablo investigates a mysterious phone call.

programme.title: Wildfire: Family Matters
programme.desc: With Pablo away, Matt trains Kris for her first turf race on Wildfire while simultaneously secretly training Wildfire's competition, Dani's horse Picaro.

programme.title: Wildfire: Nothing Takes The Past Away Like The Future
programme.desc: When Raintree takes on a well-known horse to train, Kris and Matt work together to figure out the horse's problem, only to discover the real reason Pablo wants nothing to do with it.
programme.sub-title: Nothing Takes The Past Away Like The Future

programme.title: Wildfire: Taking Off
programme.desc: Kris learns a lesson in the jockey life as she works under a renowned but demanding trainer.

programme.title: Wildfire: Fear
programme.desc: Kris must turn to Junior for help when she is asked to throw a race by John Zack, the figure from Pablo's past.

programme.title: Wildfire: Break Down
programme.desc: Kris finds herself racing Dani's horse Picaro against Wildfire, as the result of a promise she made.

programme.title: Wildfire: 51/49
programme.desc: Kris deals with crisis of confidence after events of pile-up, as Junior and Dani find out startling news about their father, Matt struggles with revealing info regarding the cause of pile-up with Kris

programme.title: Wildfire: Who Are You?
programme.desc: Kris must woo an influential heiress in hopes of getting Wildfire, and not Dani's horse Ishmael, selected for the Breeders Invitational Stakes.

programme.title: Wildfire: For Love Or Money?
programme.desc: Kris must choose between an opportunity to win a spot in the Breeders Invitational Stakes and caring for an in-labor Belladonna.

programme.title: Wildfire: Close Shave
programme.desc: Kris is reunited with Wildfire in time to race on the world's biggest stage, in the Breeders Invitational Stakes.

programme.title: Wildfire: Fairy Tale Endings
programme.desc: In the third-season premiere, Kris learns what happened to Kerry while Raintree deals with the unexpected fallout of the Breeders' Cup win.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Feud
programme.desc: Kris resorts to desperate measures to ease Raintree's financial crisis.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: On the Case: Shortcut to Murder
programme.desc: Paula Zahn goes beyond the headlines in search of fascinating mysteries from within America's justice system. A shortcut home from school causes a 14-year-old girl to cross paths with a murderer.

programme.title: On the Case: Trail of Betrayal
programme.desc: After missing newlyweds are found murdered, family members and friends point fingers at each other, leading investigators to believe someone close to the victims is responsible for their deaths.

programme.title: On the Case: A Killer in Disguise
programme.desc: Police race to track down the unlikely killer responsible for three terrifying murders.

programme.title: On the Case: Left in the Dark
programme.desc: When a beautiful young graduate student is found stabbed to death, detectives must determine if the murder was a crime of passion or a brutal attack by a violent intruder.

programme.title: On the Case: Path of Tears
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl is killed while walking her dog on a popular community bike trail.

programme.title: On the Case: Signed In Blood
programme.desc: In order to solve the vicious double murder of a beloved couple, police must uncover a cold blooded killer's carefully calculated plot.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder At Sunset- Part 1
programme.desc: A mother and two daughters are discovered floating in Tampa Bay after a brutal triple homicide. Police must rely on a victim who survived a similar attack to bring the killer to justice in this special two-hour On The Case.

programme.title: On the Case: Over The Edge
programme.desc: Police are called to the scene of what appears to be a tragic car wreck in the Blue Ridge Mountains... But as Investigators examine the crash site they realize Wendy Kratzert's death was no accident.

programme.title: On the Case: A Fateful Decision
programme.desc: A Young mother is kidnapped out of her driveway after a birthday celebration... Did a string of good luck, lead to her disappearance.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder at Bird Key
programme.desc: A successful business man is found brutally murdered in his palatial Southern Florida home. A mysterious backpack found at the crime scene is the key to the case.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Warning
programme.desc: When a 15-year-old girl vanishes in the middle of the night, a friend's terrifying secret may be the key to solving the case.

programme.title: On the Case: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in broad daylight with her toddler just a few feet away. Police have little to go on except the bizarre description eyewitnesses have given them of the brazen killer.

programme.title: On the Case: A Mystery on Cherry Hill
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman vanishes without a trace, it may take another tragedy before police will be able to solve the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: On the Case: A Killer in Town
programme.desc: Paula Zahn examines how police raced to track down a vicious killer on his deadly cross-country journey.

programme.title: On the Case: Greed, Lies and Murder
programme.desc: Fifty-year-old mother of three Marilou Johnson disappears from the home of her boyfriend, Roger Blanchard, a wealthy retired businessman, then it becomes clear Johnson has met with foul play.

programme.title: On the Case: Vanished in the Night
programme.desc: When 20 year old Lynsie Ekelund suddenly goes missing in the dead of night, it leaves her mother scrambling for answers.

programme.title: On the Case: Courage and Conviction
programme.desc: A college student's battle for survival may be the key to solving a double homicide from years earlier.

programme.title: On the Case: Darkness in The Desert
programme.desc: Paula Zahn investigates the story of a Las Vegas starlet who mysteriously vanished during a visit to a local spy store.

programme.title: On the Case: River of Tears
programme.desc: Paula examines the discovery of a young woman's lifeless body on the bank of a shallow river. A note in her pocket may point to her killer.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Arnie Calls It
programme.desc: While training waterbomber captains for the upcoming fire-fighting season, Chief Pilot Arnie makes a surprising decision. AJ becomes a DC-4 captain and ponders whether to accept a promotion.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Under New Management
programme.desc: Joe hires outsider Duane Hicks to help Buffalo navigate the future and coach Mikey. Gord and Sean's DC-3 delivery mission to the High Arctic goes awry when blizzard conditions and a broken oil cooler force an emergency landing.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Dambusters
programme.desc: Buffalo gets into the stunt flying business when veteran pilot Arnie flies the DC-4 for the re- enactment scene of a famous WWII bombing raid.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Chuck Walks
programme.desc: Critical of the many stops and starts in the Electra program, and frustrated with the constant drama at Buffalo, Chuck quits. Joe clashes with the maintenance department when a series of delays puts the sale of an old Canso waterbomber in jeopardy.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Gear Up, Gear Down
programme.desc: Frustrated with her lack of flying and stuck in a rut as a courier driver, Audrey decides her time at Buffalo is over.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Big Boost
programme.desc: When a ferry breakdown causes a gasoline shortage in Yellowknife, new manager Duane begs Chuck to return and prepare the Electra for a fuel haul.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Duane lands a huge contract for the Electra and puts enormous pressure on mechanic Adam to prep the plane without the help of his mentor Chuck.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Top of the World
programme.desc: The Electra flies to Alert, the northernmost settlement on Earth, forcing Adam and new senior manager Duane to work things out.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Last Days
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Joe discovers Gord has taken a job with a rival airline after completing expensive training on one of the Buffalo planes

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: Trying to make his mark at Buffalo, Duane lands two more Electra contracts. But his over- zealous efforts result in a clash with the crew and with Joe, and a down-to-the-wire midnight departure to meet a deadline.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Doghouse
programme.desc: Duane's decision to leave the Electra crew unsupervised while he spends time at home jeopardizes the completion of a major contract, and could cost him his job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Strip
programme.desc: Mechanic Jimmy is sent to a northern mining camp to create an ice landing strip on a remote lake where AJ will have to land a DC-3 and the much bigger C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Expect the Unexpected
programme.desc: Engine troubles on the C-46 during the valley run force Devan to shut down an engine. High winds wreak havoc for Devan and his crew on another C-46 mission to help clean up an oil spill in the Northwest Territories.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Coming Home
programme.desc: Rookie waterbomber pilot Scott gets his first taste of action when Buffalo responds to an emergency callout to fight fires in Alberta. Mikey and Rod think they hit the jackpot when they buy a million dollar firefighting plane on eBay at a bargain price.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Dark Skies
programme.desc: When Yellowknife and the northern aviation community are rocked by three crashes in the space of a month, Joe places an extra emphasis on safety, which is why he only trusts himself to perform a dangerous-looking DC-3 stunt.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Shut Down
programme.desc: Joe receives a negative visit from Transport Canada when inspectors threaten to shut down the airline. Ray and the Electra crew fly to Sachs Harbour to pick up a unique load - the hides, wool, and meat of 250 musk oxen.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Tale of Two Pilots
programme.desc: Weighed down by the responsibility of training a new rampie, and struggling to get out of Joe's doghouse, DC-3 co-pilot Tyler gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to stunt fly in his Cessna 150 for a visiting film crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Jam
programme.desc: After taking command of an intense airlift, and dealing with the ugliest Electra load he's ever seen, Scott takes a scary fall on the icy tarmac.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Very Buffalo Christmas
programme.desc: A week before Christmas, Buffalo agrees to lend a hand to an RCMP initiative to fly toys to isolated communities in the north. But a series of problems with the Electra leave the company in a jam.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Just months from retiring, Electra captain Ray Weber leads his crew on a multi-trip mission that requires landing on a rough ice strip on a remote lake.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Skarvjakt
programme.desc: Jompen och Anders beger sig ut i roslagens skärgård på skarvjakt! Syftet med denna jaktformen så här års är att freda Abborren. Häng med på ett grymt roligt äventyr med massa pangpang!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Två Dagars Drevjakt
programme.desc: Jompen är ute på en minst sagt händelserik drevjakt på Vibyholm i Sörmland. Massa vilt, missa inte!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Nyårsspecial
programme.desc: Sista avsnittet år 2020 och det firar Jompen hos Calle Dreyer nere i Blommeröd. Videon slutar med lite fina klipp från våra filmer i 2020 och en hälsning från alla oss!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Smygjakt På Svart Dovhjort & Vildsvinsjakt Med Ställande Hundar
programme.desc: Jompen & Anders är bjudna på en väldigt spännande smygjakt på Åda! En av sveriges viltrikaste marker när det kommer till dovhjort!
programme.sub-title: Smygjakt På Svart Dovhjort & Vildsvinsjakt Med Ställande Hundar

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Småland Drevjakt
programme.desc: Lubbe och Jompen är i Småland på drevjakt. Förmiddagen och dagen blir inte riktigt som dom planerat...

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Hageljakt På Rådjur Med Drever
programme.desc: Jompen, Danne & Tottie är bjudna på en traditionell hageljakt med Drever.

programme.title: Vilterian: Ribs
programme.desc: Grillade vildsvinsribs med hemgjord BBQ-sås på grillade frukter och grönsaker med en sallad på spetskål, äpplen, ingefära och citron

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Drömskoveln
programme.desc: Pierre smyger efter dovhjort i Östergötland. Dag 2 ser han ett par dovskovlar. Efter en lyckad jakt tillagar han en smarrig lunch i skogen.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Skytteträning
programme.desc: Säsongen är igång och det är viktigare än nånsin att skyttet ligger på topp. Enjoy!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Johannishus drevjakt
programme.desc: Drevjakten som alla väntat på! Återigen besöker Jompen & Danne Johannishus för en makalöst bra drevjakt på vildsvin.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Ripjakt
programme.desc: Filip och fjälljägaren Oskar Öhrström ger sig ut på en fantastisk ripjakt i de jämtländska fjällen. Det blir ett roligt avsnitt med mycket action.

programme.title: Vilterian: Hare
programme.desc: I veckans avsnitt visar Tottie hur man tar vara på en hare och lagar en fantastisk rätt som ni måste testa!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jakt I Almunge
programme.desc: Jompen åker till Uppland för att öva på drevjakt

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Skjutbio
programme.desc: Lubbe demonstrerar vikten av att träna på sina skyttefärdigheter.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Kikarsikten - Vad Ska Du Välja?
programme.desc: Jompen besöker Patrik och pratar lite om kikarsikten.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Musikhjälpen & Grisabocken
programme.desc: En av våra kära tittare köpte en jakt med oss via Musikhjälpen. Glada blev vi o alla andra involverande. Vildsvinsjakt va det vi bjussa på.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Rådjurswrap, Pierre Jagar Vidare I Tyskland & Jakt Med Wehunt
programme.desc: Jompen lagar rådjurswrap med pepparrotscreme.
programme.sub-title: Rådjurswrap, Pierre Jagar Vidare I Tyskland & Jakt Med Wehunt

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Kronhjort Och Vildsvinsjakt I Spanien & Ripjakt
programme.desc: Sista jaktdagen i Spanien. Vi jagar kronhjort och vildsvin.
programme.sub-title: Kronhjort Och Vildsvinsjakt I Spanien & Ripjakt

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Vi Testar Aimpoint Sikten
programme.desc: Jompen, Danne, Calle och Anders åker ner till Aimpoint i Skåne för att testa rödpunktssikte för första gången. Vad är fördelen med rödpunkt? Bör man byta till rödpunkt för drevjakter? Hur fungerar rödpunkt? Allt detta och mer besvaras.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Älgjakt
programme.desc: Jompen och Pierre åker på var sin älgjakt i Jämtland. Pierre prövar lyckan att gå som hundförare och Jompen står på pass.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Aska The Dog - Del 1 & 2
programme.desc: Valpen - Aska, en jakthunds resa.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Yakiniku På Vilt & Säljakt
programme.desc: Jompen o Calle brygger öl hos en kompis samtidigt som dom tillagar yakiniku o vårullar på viltkött, närmare bestämt vildsvin o rådjurskött.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Combojakt med Aimpoint
programme.desc: Drevjakt med vilt överallt! Jompen besöker Aimpoint för en grym combojakt på galet viltrika marker.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Drevjakt - Double På Vildsvin!
programme.desc: Den här veckan visar vi upp några av våra bästa jaktsekvenser från 2020! Nedan är länkar till alla filmer som visas i veckans avsnitt!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Kronvilt Med Pierre & Stor Galt Skjuts
programme.desc: Vi har blivit inbjudna av en av våra tittare på jakt efter kronhjort. Vi är i Närke på en av dom mest kronhjortstäta markerna i Sverige. Vill ni uppleva jakt på dessa marker kan ni läsa mer här: Per Rosenberg , PR jakt & fritid AB
programme.sub-title: Kronvilt Med Pierre & Stor Galt Skjuts

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Kråkviskaren
programme.desc: Jompen åker ner till Blommeröd i skåne för att jaga & laga ihop med Carl Dreijer. Han får även ovärderliga skytte och jakt-tips från kråkviskaren Conny Persson.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Bockpremiären & Pierre Jagar Kronhjort
programme.desc: Jompen och Pierre ger sig ut på Bockjakt på var sitt håll. Häng med och se hur det går för dem!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Drevjakt I Arboga
programme.desc: Jompen är bjuden på drevjakt utanför Arboga. Det visar sig vara fullt av kronhjort på markerna.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jakt På Bäver - Bäventyret
programme.desc: Jompen och Filip ger sig ut i vildmarken för att jaga bäver.

programme.title: Vilterian: Vildsvinsschnitzel
programme.desc: Denna vecka i Vilterian lagas pankofriterad vildsvinsschnitzel med sardellsmör och krämig potatissallad med vårens primör.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Två Dagars Jakt
programme.desc: Pierre ger sig ut på drevjakt med siktet inställt på rådjur och dovhjort. Det blir två fantastiska dagar i januarisolen, häng med!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Cameron Diaz, People Style Watch
programme.desc: Drew and Cameron Diaz cook and chat about their culinary adventures. Andrea Lavinthal recreates Drew's past looks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: President Joe Biden & First Lady Jill Biden
programme.desc: Drew interviews President Joe Biden and First Lady Jill Biden, discussing their relationship and Christmas traditions. FLOTUS gives a tour of the White House Christmas Decorations.
programme.sub-title: President Joe Biden & First Lady Jill Biden

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Whoopi Goldberg, Drew's News with Matt Rogers
programme.desc: Legendary actress Whoopi Goldbergis here! Actor and co-host of the podcast "Las Culturistas," Matt Rogers is serving up the news sunny-side up with Drew andRossMathews.
programme.sub-title: Whoopi Goldberg, Drew's News with Matt Rogers

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Matt Rogers, Holiday Hosting with Pilar Valdes
programme.desc: Drew, Comedian Matt Rogers, and Ross Mathewsare hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News. Drew-crew member Pilar Valdesistalking all about hosting your first holiday.
programme.sub-title: Drew's News with Matt Rogers, Holiday Hosting with Pilar Valdes

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Katherine Heigl, Drew's News with Katherine Heigl
programme.desc: Drew is chatting with actress Katherine Heiglabout the return of "Firefly Lane" and more.Plus, inan all-new Drew's News, Katherine Heigl joinsDrew and Ross Mathewsat the news desk to hit the headlines.
programme.sub-title: Katherine Heigl, Drew's News with Katherine Heigl

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Dr. Charles Sophy, Drew's News
programme.desc: Dr. Charles Sophyis joining Drew. Plus, an all-new Drew-gooderfeaturing a hero mailman. Drew and Ross Mathewsare serving the news sunny-side upin an all-newDrew's News!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's Merrymore X People Magazine Giveaway Show
programme.desc: Drew & Ross Mathews host Drew MerryMore X People Magazine Holiday Giveaway. Studio audience of Drew-gooders get $300K in gifts. Drew highlights Drew-Gooders making difference in community.
programme.sub-title: Drew's Merrymore X People Magazine Giveaway Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Kristina Zias, Drew's News
programme.desc: Kristina Zias talks nostalgic fashion trends and wedding etiquette with Drew & Ross Mathews. Brendan Fraser's comeback and scientific reasons behind listening to sad songs on Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Mindy Kaling, Drew's News
programme.desc: Mindy Kaling talks holiday prep with kids, shares behind-the-scenes stories from "The Office" and "Oceans 8" and more. Drew & Ross Mathews cover snooze button science, dating ghosting debate, and saving a NY deli on Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News, Money-Saving Holiday MealFor Next Gathering
programme.desc: Pilar Valdes and Drew share money-saving holiday meal. Drew & Ross Mathews talk empowering single moms, Greta Gerwig's thoughts on a movie, and feature Drew-crime segment with two great grandmas stopping a purse snatcher. (200)
programme.sub-title: Drew's News, Money-Saving Holiday MealFor Next Gathering

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Aubrey Plaza, Savannah Guthrie
programme.desc: "Today" co-anchor Savannah Guthrie is serving the news sunny-side up with Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk and dishing on her new series "Princess Power." Aubrey Plaza stops by to chat about the follow-up to "The Return of the Christmas Witch."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Gabe LaBelle, Chef Melissa King
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News. Drew chats with "The Fabelmans" star Gabe LaBelle who shares what it was like working with and portraying a young Steven Spielberg. Chef Melissa King joins Drew in the kitchen.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Emily in Paris" Cast
programme.desc: The cast of "Emily in Paris" including Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo stop by to chat about the new season. The cast is also participating in an "Emily in Paris" style makeover for a deserving audience member.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew & A with Cast of "Emily in Paris," Pilar Valdes
programme.desc: "Emily in Paris" stars Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo are joining Drew for a round of Drew & A. Pilar Valdes is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up some yummy crepes.
programme.sub-title: Drew & A with Cast of "Emily in Paris," Pilar Valdes

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Pilar Valdes, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathewsare covering the news including headlines like the study that found mammals who have friends live longer and the ice cream shop in D.C. serving everyone, even those who can't pay! Pilar Valdesis back with a new Pro Tips with Pilar.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Tig Notaro, Drew's News
programme.desc: "Your Place or Mine" star Tig Notaro is telling Drew about working with Reese Witherspoon on their new film and the latest season of "The Morning Show."

programme.title: A Godwink Christmas: Miracle of Love
programme.desc: Joy og Eric leter begge etter en følelse av mening i livet, og møtes under en frivillig jobb der Joy bruker ferdighetene sine som sykepleier og Eric setter skriveferdighetene sine på prøve.

programme.title: Candy Cane Candidate
programme.desc: En kvinne vender tilbake til hjembyen til jul etter en mislykket kampanje og møter sin gamle rival.

programme.title: The Christmas Spirit
programme.desc: En ulykke fører til at Charlotte havner i koma, men ånden hennes er våken. I forkant av en avstemning om et eiendomsprosjekt må hun få byen og utbyggeren til å ombestemme seg uten at noen kan se eller høre henne.

programme.title: A Puppy for Christmas
programme.desc: Noelle har det perfekte oppsettet: en bra jobb, en fin kjæreste og et drømmeliv. Men etter å ha adoptert en liten valp, snus livet hennes på hodet og bare litt julemagi kan fikse det.

programme.title: Christmas Unfiltered
programme.desc: På julaften ønsker Becky at familien hennes virkelig skal høre henne. Alle tankene og frustrasjonene hennes renner ut når hun uforvarende begynner å fortelle alle hva hun egentlig tenker.

programme.title: Christmas on Candy Cane Lane
programme.desc: Ivy balanserer ferieforpliktelser, datteren og motstridende følelser til eksmannen, alt samtidig med at en mystisk skøyer skaper rabalder i Candy Cane Lane.

programme.title: On the Twelfth Day of Christmas
programme.desc: Maggie blir overlykkelig når hun finner ut at hennes gamle kjæreste skal flytte tilbake til byen der hun bor.

programme.title: A Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: Tom hjelper klientene sine med å finne den perfekte gaven. Etter hvert som Tom blir bedre kjent med Jenny, blir ting komplisert når han innser at han forelsker seg i vennens kjæreste.

programme.title: A Christmas Star
programme.desc: En astronom spår at et nytt meteorregn vil dukke opp over en liten by, men hun må overbevise lokalbefolkningen om å hjelpe til med oppdagelsen hennes på bekostning av en juletradisjon.

programme.title: When Hope Calls Christmas
programme.desc: Brookfield er valgt av et nasjonalt magasin til å bli omtalt for sin juleånd, og innbyggerne slår seg sammen for å gjøre samfunnet deres til et jule-eventyrland.

programme.title: Hotel for the Holidays
programme.desc: Samtidig som hotelldirektøren Georgia navigerer i romantiske forviklinger med kokken og en kjekk prins, får vi et innblikk i livet til andre gjester og ansatte.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Years ago Jazmin lived in foster care. Now she's living large thanks to having been adopted by rich parents, and she's anxious to have a Sweet 16 to make up for all of the birthdays she's missed.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Bjorn is a divo who wants to have a hot fashion party at his local mall. But will nerves and being seriously late ruin his party?

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Weeman, Jack Osbourne, Pink, Stephan Dorf
programme.desc: "Wee Man" Acuna and Jack Osbourne are given a hard time by MTV security, Pink thinks she is being framed by her boyfriend, Carey Hart, for running a motorcycle "chop shop" and Stephen Dorff (Blade) is set up to get stuck with an $8,000 bar tab.
programme.sub-title: Weeman, Jack Osbourne, Pink, Stephan Dorf

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Missy Elliot, Hilary Duff, Usher
programme.desc: Missy Elliott gets caught up in a bling sting when her jewel-encrusted dog tags are given to the wrong messenger, Hilary Duff gets a driver's education when her car gets jacked by the Punk'd crew. Also, Usher's brother is picked up for shoplifting...

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Nick Carter, Tommy Lee, Lil' Bow Wow
programme.desc: Nick Carter thinks he's punking his friend Tommy Lee, only to find out tables have been turned on him, Tommy Lee thinks he and his friend Nick Carter are going for a test drive only to find that they've been involved in a hit and run Punk'd Style...
programme.sub-title: Nick Carter, Tommy Lee, Lil' Bow Wow

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Mya, Katie Holmes, Tracy Morgan
programme.desc: Mya gets up close and personal with her biggest fan, Katie Holmes (Dawson's Creek) gets involved in a torrid love triangle and Tracy Morgan (The Tracy Morgan Show) gets his car towed when the Punk'd valet crew parks his ride in the red zone.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Dingo
programme.desc: Snowboarderen The Dingo hjelper Rob med å presentere Pain Angels, Worst Case Scenarios og That'll Cost You. Og du gjetter aldri hva som skjer når en vektløfter mister kontrollen.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matthew Mounce
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo og Chanel ler seg i hjel av Unnecessary Combos, Stay Out Of The Water og Who Put That There, og karateeksperten Matthew Mounce presenterer Bad Karate.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jeff Tremaine
programme.desc: Produsenten Jeff Tremaine hjelper Rob med å presentere episodens klipp. Noen barn begynner tidlig i Ridiculousness in Training, og to elefanter hjelper hverandre med en vanskelig matbit.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matt Schlager
programme.desc: Skjønnhetsdronningen Caite Upton er med i panelet, Matt Schlager viser hvordan man faller med ansiktet først, og du får se klippene Inappropriate Animals, Misfires And False Starts og Yoga Fart.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Tenåringsmoren Maci vurderer å slå opp med forloveden Ryan. Farrah dater en ny gutt, selv om familien misliker det. Amber strever med utdanningen, og Catelynn føler at forholdet til datteren er blitt svekket etter adopsjonen.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynns familie liker ikke adopsjonsvalget. Amber og forloveden Gary krangler konstant. Farrah oppdager at dating ikke vanskelig for en ung mor, og Maci sliter med å balansere morsrollen og studiene når vennene begynner på college.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Konflikten mellom Amber og Gary når kokepunktet, og Catelynn leter etter et nytt sted å bo når moren hennes flytter. Nysingle Maci skifter mening, og guttegale Farrah ønsker beskyttelse.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynn takler valget om adopsjon på en utflukt med andre mødre, og Maci og Ryan besøker en rådgiver. Amber vurderer å takke ja til hjelp fra eksen, og Farrah lurer på om hun burde være mer hjemme med barnet sitt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: What Happens in the AC
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Atlantic City, der moro blir til alvor idet Mike støter fra seg både Snooki og Jwoww. En av deltakerne avslører at hun har hatt spiseforstyrrelser.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Shot
programme.desc: Sommeren går mot slutten, men dramaet er ikke over. Pauly får en stalker, og en deltaker havner i fengsel etter en slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: That's How The Shore Goes
programme.desc: Ronnie slipper ut, og Snooki får trøst etter et møte med eksen. Gjengen tar farvel med The Shore, men ikke uten en siste tur i boblebadet.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Nelly, Russel Simmons, O-Town
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Nelly, Russel Simmons, O-Town.

programme.title: Made: Moto-X
programme.desc: Kaitlin Smith wants to shed her girly girl reputation and find her inner strength by being MADE into a rough and tough motocross racer!

programme.title: Made: Basketball Player
programme.desc: Kenneth is a dancing diva who's determined to gain the acceptance of his military father by being Made into a basketball player.

programme.title: Made: Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: Ben has no luck in love and is hoping to be MADE into the Perfect Boyfriend.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: A white horse-drawn buggy (complete with prince) makes Cindy's Sweet 16 a Cinderella fairytale. That is, until her mom dances with her date.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: A bikini photo shoot, a dress inspired by the movie The Princess Diaries II, and thirty dancers make up Janelle's Quinceanera. Let's hope her diva mother doesn't ruin it!

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: With the famous R&B singer Gerald Levert as her father, Carlysia gets what she wants. This includes a personal assistant and famous friends.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Take
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Kiss of Death and the Google Exec
programme.desc: A report about the investigation into the 2013 drug-related death of Google executive Forrest Hayes and Alix Tichelman, the woman charged with killing him, whose ex-boyfriend also died of a lethal overdose.
programme.sub-title: Kiss of Death and the Google Exec

programme.title: 48 Hours: Good Cop/Bad Cop: Solving the Murder of Heather Bogle
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.
programme.sub-title: Good Cop/Bad Cop: Solving the Murder of Heather Bogle

programme.title: 48 Hours: Grave Injustice
programme.desc: A report on the case of Anthony Graves, who spent eighteen years -- twelve of them on death row -- in a Texas prison for murders he did not commit.

programme.title: 48 Hours: One of Their Own
programme.desc: A report about how female Los Angeles Police Detective Stephanie Lazarus was charged with the 1986 murder of Sherri Mae Rasmussen. The victim, newly married to Lazarus’ ex-boyfriend, was attacked, beaten and shot to death in her Los Angeles home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Redemption Song
programme.desc: A report on the 1985 death of Natalie Antonetti, a woman who was part of the Austin, Texas music community. She was found beaten at home by her son, Johnny Goodie, and remained in a coma for two weeks before she died.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Vase Against Enrico Forti
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Red Notice For Murder
programme.desc: A report on the international search conducted by Nadia Ford and private detective Herman Weisberg for Viktoria Nasyrova, a Russian woman suspected of the 2014 murder of Ford's mother, Alla Aleksenko.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Click for a Killer
programme.desc: Part two of a two-part report on the alarming world of murder-for-hire on the mysterious "dark web," exposes an international criminal organization in a hunt for a self-described murder mastermind named Yura.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death on Valentine's Day
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Stalked: Out of the Shadows - Part 1
programme.desc: A two-part investigation into stalking -- the victims, the stalkers, the dangers and the long-term psychological damage this torment causes. Includes a report on the stalking death of singer Christina Grimmie.
programme.sub-title: Stalked: Out of the Shadows - Part 1

programme.title: 48 Hours: Last Chance for Freedom
programme.desc: A report on Crosley Green, who in 1990 was convicted of the murder of Charles "Chip" Flynn and sentenced to death. Green has spent the last 26 years, with help from lawyers and private investigators, trying to prove his innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in the O.C.
programme.desc: A report on the 1994 murder of millionaire businessman Bill McLaughlin in his California home. After his divorce, he became involved with the much younger Nanette Johnston, who it was later discovered, made a habit of seeking out wealthy men to date.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dangerous Beauty
programme.desc: A report on the 2003 murder of Russel Douglas on Whidbey Island, Washington, and how the investigation led to the involvement of Peggy Sue Thomas, a one-time Washington beauty queen-turned-high-end limo driver.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Drawn to Murder - Part 1
programme.desc: A two-part report on the February 1987 murder of 37-year-old Peggy Hettrick in Fort Collins, Colorado. Her mutilated, half-naked body was discovered in a field near the home of Tim Masters, a 15-year-old who lived near the crime scene.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Facebook Detectives
programme.desc: A report about three Texas housewives, Tammye Markle, Joni Shannon, and Tina Wiley, who call themselves the "Facebook Detectives" and who used the Internet to try to find their friend Lisa Stone, who disappeared from her Dallas home in June 2010.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Michael Politte
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The McGuire Diaries
programme.desc: In May of 2004, Bill McGuire’s dismembered body was found in three suitcases in Chesapeake Bay. He had been shot with a .38 caliber gun. His wife Melanie claimed that Bill had vanished weeks before, after an argument.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Love and Death in Alaska - Part 2
programme.desc: On May 2, 1996, the body of Kent Leppink was found off a deserted road in Alaska. He had been shot three times. Police discovered that he had been involved with Mechele Hughes, a young woman who worked as a stripper in a club.
programme.sub-title: Love and Death in Alaska - Part 2

programme.title: 48 Hours: Secrets of the River
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.
