programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bargain
programme.desc: The former dictator of a Caribbean island is made to have hallucinatory visions in which he sees his ominous destiny as part of an ingenious plot designed by the Impossible Missions Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Mind of Stefan Miklos
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is pitted against the ingenious logic of an enemy agent (guest Steve Ihnat) as the IMF attempts to lead the agent through a maze of complicated clues in order to reach a false conclusion.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Freeze
programme.desc: Before a statute of limitations expires on a 10-million dollar robbery, the Impossible Missions Force must spring the suspect from prison and dupe him into leading police to the hiding place of the money.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Test Case
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force must end the murderous career of a bacteriologist working for the enemy, who has succeeded in developing a mutant strain of a deadly bacteria which could be used as a practical battlefield weapon.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The System
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) sets out to persuade the trusted henchman of a crime syndicate leader to testify against his boss.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Glass Cage
programme.desc: An electronically guarded prison confronts the Impossible Missions Force when it tries to free a political prisoner (Richard Garland) from an escape-proof glass cell.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Live Bait
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force invades the intricate world of spies to protect an American double agent and comes up against a human time bomb.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Doomsday
programme.desc: When an unscrupulous manufacturer risks World War III by offering a hydrogen bomb for sale, the Impossible Missions Force enters the bidding with a dangerous plan to keep the weapon out of enemy hands.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bunker, Pt. 1
programme.desc: The IMF races a paid killer who is stalking a nuclear scientist forced by the enemy to work on a device that could upset the world power balance in the first of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bunker, Pt. 2
programme.desc: While trying to free a nuclear scientist and his wife from enemy hands, the IMF is trapped when a would-be assassin takes over one of Rollin's disguises in Part 2.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Nitro
programme.desc: The IMF finds itself only a second away from eternity when they intercept a nitroglycerine expert who plans to blow up the government house of a small country, thus provoking war with its neighbor nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Vault
programme.desc: Guest star Nehemiah Persoff as a corrupt Latin American official plots to loot his own country of $40,000,000 with the connivance of the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Nicole
programme.desc: Guest star Joan Collins, as a seductive double agent, endangers a vital IMF project when Jim Phelps falls in love with her.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Illusion
programme.desc: Cinnamon and Rollin become cabaret performers in a plot to get a deranged man (guest Fritz Weaver) to fall in love with Cinnamon, then kill her.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Interrogator
programme.desc: In a bold experiment with a man's mind, the IMF blanks out an enemy agent's memory (guest star Henry Silva), then sets out to make him think he is someone else.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Controllers (Part 1)
programme.desc: Leonard Nimoy and guest star Dina Merrill join the Impossible Missions Force to fight a mind-destroying drug that could enslave the free world in the first of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Controllers (Part 2)
programme.desc: Jim Phelps lets himself be framed for murder in a scheme to discredit a scientist who has developed a mind-destroying drug in the second of a two-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Vendepunktet
programme.desc: Vincent blir separert fra sin vakre, men reserverte kone, og er utro med en blid og lidenskapelig skribent. Kjærligheten hennes lover en ny begynnelse, men Vincent slites mellom de to kvinnene, så hans fremtidige lykke står på spill.

programme.title: A Midsummer's Hawaiian Dream
programme.desc: I denne parafrasen av Shakespeares "A Midsummer Night's Dream" to gifte antropologiprofessorer og studentene deres prøver å finne en hellig tiki for å stoppe ødeleggelsene av Hawaii-jungelen.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: Two lovers engage in a passionate but thwarted romance in this modern adaptation of the classic novel.

programme.title: Tamara Drewe
programme.desc: Den unge journalisten Tamara Drewe vender tilbake til sine røtter på den engelske landsbygda for å selge sitt barndomshjem etter at hennes mor dør. Hennes ankomst skaper mildt sagt en hel del uro i byen.

programme.title: Da Ray Møtte Helen
programme.desc: På merkelige måter, og helt uavhengige av hverandre, får Ray og Helen plutselig mye penger mellom hendene. Det gir dem muligheten til å gjenskape seg selv. Mens Ray og Helen jukser seg vei til det søte liv, krysses deres stier.

programme.title: Benjamin
programme.desc: I Simon Amstells rørende, bittersøte komedie, blir en ung, fremadstormende filmskaper kastet inn i en emosjonell malstrøm av en spirende romanse og den kommende premieren på hans andre spillefilm.

programme.title: 10 Things we should do before we break up
programme.desc: Den kvelden da Abigail, enslig mor til to små barn, møter Ben på en bar, lager de på fleip en liste over ting å gjøre før et tenkt brudd, enda de godt vet at de aldri kommer til å innlede noe forhold engang.

programme.title: Delirious
programme.desc: Les er kjendisfotograf og er avhengig av blinkskudd for å overleve. Toby Grace (Michael Pitt) er uteligger og avhengig av veldedighet for å overleve. En dag møtes disse to tilfeldig og et slags vennskap på godt og vondt utvikler seg dem imellom.

programme.title: A Christmas Feast
programme.desc: Det er jul og familien Oliverio gjør seg klare til De Syv Fiskers Middag, en italiensk kulinarisk tradisjon som har sine røtter fra gamlelandet. Midt i forberedelsene undrer Tony, en ung mann med store drømmer, om han vil finne kjærligheten i julen.

programme.title: Can You Keep a Secret?
programme.desc: Emma tror de skal krasje og forteller alle sine hemmeligheter til en fremmed på flyet. Hun trodde iallfall at han var en fremmed. Basert på bestselgende roman med samme navn av forfatteren av 'Confessions of a shopaholic' Sophie Kinsella.

programme.title: Scary Movie 2
programme.desc: Noen har ført kjærligheten din til oppfølgerne for langt! Favorittkomirollene til Scary Movie er tilbake i en film som skremmer opp enda mer ærbødig moro enn originalen med sitt syn på klisjéhjemsøkte thrillere.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Forfatteren Ellison (Ethan Hawke) skriver kriminalsaker fra virkeligheten og er på jakt etter en ny bestselger. Uten å fortelle resten av familien om sine motiver, flytter de til et hus der det tidligere har skjedd en rekke bestialske drap.

programme.title: Apollo 18
programme.desc: Ifølge historiebøkene var Apollo 17 NASAs siste bemannede ferd til månen. Det du får se her er den udokumenterte og strengt hemmelige ferden til Apollo 18, hvor to astronauter ble sendt tilbake til månen.

Fra regissør Darren Lynn Bousman kommer en paranormal og skremmende numerologithriller. Etter sin kones tragiske dødsfall reiser forfatteren Joseph Crone til Barcelona for å gjenforenes med broren Samuel og sin døende far.

programme.title: The Collector
programme.desc: THE COLLECTOR følger opp historien til håndverkeren Arkin, som gjør absolutt alt han kan og mer til for å betale gjelden til sin eks-kone ved å rane hjemmet til sin nye oppdragsgiver.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Long Live Walter Jameson
programme.desc: Walter Jameson is an excellent history teacher who talks about the past as if he had lived it.

programme.title: Scary Movie 2
programme.desc: Noen har ført kjærligheten din til oppfølgerne for langt! Favorittkomirollene til Scary Movie er tilbake i en film som skremmer opp enda mer ærbødig moro enn originalen med sitt syn på klisjéhjemsøkte thrillere.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Ninety Years Without Slumbering
programme.desc: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Visions
programme.desc: Johnny sets out to discover the secret of a mysterious man (Frank Whaley) who appears to be stalking him but actually has a life-changing message for Johnny.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Mirror
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: People Are Alike All Over
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mr. Dingle, the Strong
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: Scary Movie 2
programme.desc: Noen har ført kjærligheten din til oppfølgerne for langt! Favorittkomirollene til Scary Movie er tilbake i en film som skremmer opp enda mer ærbødig moro enn originalen med sitt syn på klisjéhjemsøkte thrillere.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Long Distance Call
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Piano in the House
programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Fever
programme.desc: Tight-fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Enigma
programme.desc: In helping an old man find his long lost love, Johnny Smith falls in love with the woman himself through visions he has of her in her youth.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Da Bomb
programme.desc: Team Scorpion har i oppgave å hjelpe NASAs topphemmelige rakettoppskyting, men de må sabotere sitt eget oppdrag når Walters date fra forrige kveld har en bombe festet til brystet hennes.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Fractured
programme.desc: Etter at et kraftig jordskjelv rammer Los Angeles, må Team Scorpion fikse en fastklemt gassledning for å forhindre en massiv eksplosjon.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Adaptation
programme.desc: Mens Team Scorpion jobber for å stoppe en tilstrømning av narkotika som blir smuglet inn i landet via droner, gir Walter Happy og Toby et ultimatum for deres nye forhold.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Fast and the Nerdiest
programme.desc: Teamet må infiltrere en eksklusiv bilsmuglingsoperasjon som er i ferd med å sende biovåpen til Sør-Amerika.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Ticker
programme.desc: Når blodforsyningen til Los Angeles blir hacket og ansett som ubrukelig, må Team Scorpion finne den skyldige og redde en ung jente som desperat trenger en hjertetransplantasjon.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: Cabe blir tatt til fange under et hemmelig oppdrag i Djibouti sammen med sin nye Homeland-protégé Tim Armstrong, og Team Scorpion må redde ham.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Twist and Shout
programme.desc: Team Scorpions oppdrag for redde restene av falne marinesoldater i Vietnam er truet sammen med livet deres når en dødelig tornado kommer direkte mot dem.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Hard Knox
programme.desc: Teamet blir hyret av forsvarsdepartementet for å bryte seg inn i Fort Knox og "stjele" en dyrebar gjenstand for å teste sikkerheten deres.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Chernobyl Intentions
programme.desc: Team Scorpion drar til Tsjernobyl for å reparere den forefallende atomreaktoren før en katastrofal nedsmelting, men må også redde Sylvester og Paige når de blir fanget inne.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Toby or Not Toby
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må være smartere enn deres ustabile eks-Scorpion-medlem, Mark Collins, etter at han kidnapper Toby og truer med å drepe ham med mindre hans utspekulerte krav blir oppfylt.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: More Civil War
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må legge problemene til side når anonyme hackere med ukjente motiver tar kontroll over amerikanske militærfly og krigsskip og retter våpen mot amerikanske byer.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You
programme.desc: Akkurat i det teamet gjør fremskritt mot hackerne som kontrollerer amerikanske krigsskip, får de vite at en amerikansk atomubåt også er blitt hacket.
programme.sub-title: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Når Walter ved et uhell blir skutt ut i verdensrommet i en rakett, hallusinerer han om Paige mens oksygenet hans går tom, og Team Scorpion jobber febrilsk for å finne en måte å få ham hjem før han blir kvalt.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Teamet må finne en gutt fra Ralphs klasse som forsvinner på en ekskursjon etter å ha støtt på en dødelig forbryter.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Bat Poop Crazy
programme.desc: Team Scorpions enkle jobb ved Natural History Museum i Los Angeles blir dødelig når de oppdager tyver som raner en utstilling med sjeldne edelstener for å berike en atombombe.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote
programme.desc: Før Halloween må teamet infiltrere et dypt, enormt hulesystem for å hindre en flaggermusbestand i å ødelegge det nordamerikanske økosystemet.
programme.sub-title: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sly and the Family Stone
programme.desc: På valgdagen, når demokratiet står på spill, blir Team Scorpion kalt inn når noen prøver å skape kaos i det amerikanske presidentvalget.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Mother Load
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion reiser til Irland for Megans ettårsjubileum, oppdager Walter at en naturkatastrofe i en innsjø i nærheten har skapt en giftig sky som kan drepe alle i landsbyen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: This Is the Pits
programme.desc: Paiges mor verver Team Scorpion når hun ved et uhell oppdager en glemt atomreaktor i ferd med å eksplodere.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Walter må svømme gjennom de dødelige La Brea-tjæregropene mens teamet hjelper en kvinne som sitter fast i tjæren før hun går tom for oksygen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Det er julaften og Team Scorpions elektronikkfrie ferie på fjellet blir dødelig når de støter på våpensmuglere og Ralph blir kidnappet mens de prøver å rømme.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 501
programme.desc: Louise og Jonas fra Viborg drømmer stort, men drømmen faller i bakken med et brak. Ekspertene må jobbe hardt før den lille familien - forhåpentligvis - kan flytte inn i drømmehuset.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 502
programme.desc: Anita og Martins to barn har tatt over hjemmet, og det er leker overalt. Løsningen er et større hjem, men paret har ikke klart å finne det rette huset enda. Nå får de hjelp av ekspertene, men det blir ikke lett.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 503
programme.desc: Tina og Danni solgte rekkehuset sitt i den tro at de snart skulle finne det rette huset. Men sånn gikk det ikke. Paret er utrolig kresne, og har høye krav. Kan ekspertene skape hjemmet som Tina og Danni drømmer om?

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 504
programme.desc: Laura og Jesper og Jespers to barn leier i Humlebæk, og de er mildt sagt lei av det. De mangler plass, hage - og de vil også ha barn sammen snart. Men to års husjakt har ikke gitt resultat.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 505
programme.desc: Ulla og Kristian bor i en vakker herskapsleilighet på Frederiksberg med sine to barn. Men de vil ha mer plass i et barnevennlig nabolag, innom sykkelavstand fra sentrum. Kan Tobias Edlev-Nielsen finne et hus til dem?

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO
programme.desc: Kristian drømmer om en diger garasje, og Nathja vil heller bli i Køge – kan Tobias oppfylle drømmene sine?

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO
programme.desc: Maja og Kenneth bor på Vestjylland og drømmer om å komme nærmere familien til Maja i Silkeborg. Men budsjettet deres krever at de går på akkord med beliggenheten og ser i de nærliggende små byene.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 604
programme.desc: Stine og Daniel lengter etter mer plass før de snart utvider familien fra tre til fire. Derfor er det ikke optimalt når Mads ringer og forteller at avtalen med det nye huset deres i Langå ikke gjelder.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 301
programme.desc: Astrid og Steffen skal kjøpe sitt første hus, men de kan ikke gå på kompromiss med ønskene sine. De møter programmets eksperter som skal kjøpe et hus på deres vegne.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 302
programme.desc: Louise og Michael har vokst ut av sin lille leilighet i Århus og trenger mer plass. Paret gjør et kompromiss, og Louise står overfor sitt største mareritt i huset som ekspertene kjøper til dem.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Åland
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, Åland’s shipping fleet was the envy of navies around the world, and their sea trade was encouraged by the seafood, grains and fruits that thrive on these islands. Tareq prepares recipes to reflect Åland’s unique cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Malmö
programme.desc: Tareq is in his hometown of Malmö – Sweden’s third largest city. The food scene here is inspired by the traditional seafood dishes and the large immigrant population whose recipes have given Malmö a new energy.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Finland's South Coast
programme.desc: Tareq takes a late autumn trip along Finland’s southern coast. He stops in the capital Helsinki to see how the city's food culture is about to be discovered by the rest of the world, and dives into the freezing waters around Ekenäs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Kiruna
programme.desc: Tareq arrives in Kiruna, over 200km north of the Arctic Circle. With the weather getting down to -30C, Tareq takes part in snow picnics, firing up the smoker, and using snow and ice as part of the recipes he prepares.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Bergen
programme.desc: Surrounded by some of the most beautiful landscapes in northern Europe, Bergen has become a centre for the finest seafood in northern Europe. Tareq heads into this winter wonderland to see the curious cuisine that has developed in western Norway.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: The Faroe Islands
programme.desc: Tareq comes to understand what is in the soul of the Faroese, and why their cuisine has developed the way it has. We explore the beautiful capital Torshavn and surrounding villages, and sail into a cave for a recipe prepared on a rowboat.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Central Jutland
programme.desc: Volcanoes and glaciers shaped this part of the country, leaving a giant fjord and pre-historic fossils in their wake. Farmers and food innovators work closely with nature to prepare food with the area’s plentiful herbs and award-winning seafood.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Åland (Part 2)
programme.desc: Tareq goes back to Åland to explore more of this island territory. Tareq finds a chef setting up a huge food village, sees forts left over from various invaders over the centuries, and learns about beer being recreated from 200 year old DNA.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Tornedalen
programme.desc: There are not many places like Tornedalen. A rushing river has provided for locals for centuries, and the very fertile land has yielded amazing crops for centuries.Tareq explores the traditions and the food that are part of the short summer season.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: North Jutland
programme.desc: At the northern-most part of Denmark, you are always close to raw, beautiful nature, and incredible sunlight that has drawn artists here for over 100 years. Tareq visits a salt maker using medieval techniques and experiences the magic light of Skagen.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: East Denmark
programme.desc: East Denmark contains some of Denmark’s most fertile lands, and many traditional farmers are converting to organic production and winning awards for their cheeses and wine. Tareq bikes through an area of limestone cliffs and Viking ships.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Kristianstad
programme.desc: Located in Sweden’s south, beautiful Kristianstad is a 400-year old town surrounded by the ocean, fertile farmland and protected wetlands to aid the environment. Tareq makes his own chocolate and learns all about the art of eel-fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Southwest Jutland
programme.desc: Tareq visits Sydvestjylland – a unique area in Denmark filled with endless contrasts. Many food innovators are using the surrounding environment to take old traditions and apply them to the 21st century.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Nynäshamn
programme.desc: Sunny Nynäshamn is a resort town close to Stockholm, but there is more here than the sea. Tareq meets a prize-winning chocolate maker using ingredients from her garden, visits a thriving local food market, and gets a lesson in how to smoke fish.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Røros
programme.desc: Born as a mining town in the 17th century, Røros is now a center for local and organic food producers. Tareq tries dairy products which Michelin-starred chefs swear by, goes skiing and sledding around Røros many hilly streets

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Vimmerby
programme.desc: Vimmerby is known as the birthplace of beloved author Astrid Lindgren. Tareq finds that the area is also well-regarded for its cuisine. From the children’s theme park to the friendly moose that roam the hills, Vimmerby has a lot to offer visitors.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Trysil
programme.desc: The mountains and snowfall in Trysil mean that the town has to be creative with food; Tareq learns how to make cheese in the traditional way, and goes skiing of course, and takes to the slopes to cook something as skiers pass by.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Värmland
programme.desc: Värmland is home to many of Sweden’s most famous authors and inventors. However, it is also a place with a rich food culture. Tareq gets his hands on a very rare bird to cook and also takes time out to float down a tranquil river on a wooden raft.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Fyn
programme.desc: Tareq visits Fyn, the fairy tale capital of the world. Famous as the birthplace of Hans Christian Andersen, Fyn is also known as the garden of Denmark. Here we explore stunning nature and world class cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Höga Kusten
programme.desc: Created thousands of years ago, the High Coast in the northern part of Sweden is the highest coast in the world. Tareq sets out to sample one of the most extreme types of Swedish food, fermented herring.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: North Denmark
programme.desc: North Jutland has a rich culinary history. The unique conditions have created equally unique products. Tareq meets local food entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever changing environment and putting this region on the culinary map.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Uppsala
programme.desc: Uppsala is the city of knowledge: home to the oldest university in Scandinavia. It’s a wonderful agricultural area surrounded by fertile flatlands. Tareq discovers the historical treasures of Uppsala and its thriving culinary life.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: North Sealand
programme.desc: North Zealand has been a playground of the rich and famous since the fifteenth century. Tareq learns how this beautiful north eastern part of Denmark is the perfect place to go foraging for wild berries and herbs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Åre
programme.desc: Sweden’s largest ski resort Åre is well known for its local ingredients, boasting the highest number of organic food producers per capita in Sweden. The fresh water and clean air create unique conditions for growing excellent food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: The Danish Lakelands
programme.desc: The Danish Lakelands produce some of the finest ingredients that you can find. Tareq has a go at an old cooking technique from New Zealand called Hangi - using heated rocks buried in a pit oven.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: West Sweden
programme.desc: Gothenburg on the west coast of Sweden has recently been discovered as an exciting destination by both international travel journalists and food bloggers. Tareq tracks down an old army barracks which has been converted into a world class cheese factory.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Luleå
programme.desc: Tareq visits Luleå, home to the beautiful Tree Hotel: a collection of treehouses built by an award winning architect. Following the river further up into the mountains he reaches the land where, for centuries, the Sami people kept their reindeer herds.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Halmstad
programme.desc: In Halmstad Tareq explores the contrast between the busy summer scene at the beach and the quiet rural country life, meeting Jörgen Persson: award winning table tennis player and visiting a village famous for its cheese.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Kemi
programme.desc: Kemi is situated in northern Finland by the Bothnian Bay and it is part of Lapland region. Tareq tries his luck at a spot of burbot fishing on the frozen sea and visits the snow castle hotel.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When an interpreter working for the Chinese consulate is killed in an apparent hit and run accident, Don and his team uncover an unlikely connection to the Department of Justice.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When Don and his team investigate a murder at a horse track, they stumble onto more than just a plot of betting on fixed races. Aya Sumika ("The O.C.") begins her recurring role as agent Liz Warner, Don's former trainee.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a series of blackouts occur in power stations leaving Los Angeles in the dark, Don and his team must determine if it is an accident or the work of terrorists.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team investigate the death of a minor league baseball player to determine if it was an accidental overdose of steroids or a homicide.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team investigate a trail of illegal waste disposal after a sinkhole, which collapses in a school playground, kills an elderly woman and injures several children. Kathy Najimy joins the cast in a recurring role as Charlie's new boss.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: During the murder investigation of a state senator, Don and his team discover a plot to exact revenge on the individuals involved in a government sponsored behavior modification project.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and Charlie try to catch a serial killer who is seeking revenge against internet sexual predators who prey on young girls they meet in chat rooms. Apollo 11 Astronaut Buzz Aldrin guest-stars as himself.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team search for the fundamentalist leader of a polygamous sect who is on the FBI's most wanted list for committing numerous crimes, including rape and murder.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a multi-million dollar racing yacht sinks during a race, Don and his team are called to investigate after the treasure hunt to find the wreckage turns deadly.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team investigate a rash of deadly restaurant robberies. During the investigation, the FBI discovers that the thieves steal the restaurant customer's credit cards so that they can run up charges at a fake internet store.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the FBI re-open a 17-year-old unsolved case when the badge of a missing LAPD officer, who is presumed dead, is found at a construction site.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a competitive mixed-martial arts fighter dies suspiciously in the ring while training for a championship match, the victim's sparring partner, who also happens to be friends with David, becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While Don is unreachable at a therapy session, the FBI and Charlie try to find the son of a music mogul whose kidnapper threatens to kill the boy if he is not paid a multi-million dollar ransom in one hour.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Charlie tries to connect a series of murders to a voter fraud conspiracy and must track down who benefits the most from the rigged elections before more people die.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a small plane mysteriously crashes, Charlie tests the flight computer and uncovers the truth behind what brought the plane down.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While on the hunt for a serial letter bomber, Don and Charlie disagree over whether a suspected bomber, who had eluded conviction years earlier, is the person responsible for the latest murder.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don believes that a death row inmate has an ulterior motive when he suddenly wants to confess the whereabouts of bodies he buried during his days as a hit man for the mob.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the FBI uncover a possible terrorist attack on Los Angeles that targets the city's water supply.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When thieves hijack a truck filled with valuable medical supplies, $50 million dollars intended for a relief effort in Zambia and two aid workers, the FBI races a second violent crew intent on getting to the goods first.

programme.title: The Bells Of St Mary's
programme.desc: At a big city Catholic school, Father O'Malley and Sister Benedict indulge in friendly rivalry, and succeed in extending the school through the gift of a building.

programme.title: Perversion Story
programme.desc: En samvittighetsløs lege blir anklaget for å ha drept sin astmatiske kone som en del av en forsikringssvindel – til tross for at han oppdager at hun har en dobbeltgjenger som jobber som stripper og eskortepike.

programme.title: Dick Dynamite 1944
programme.desc: Mot slutten av krigen planlegger nazister å gjøre New Yorks befolkning til zombier. Bare DICK DYNAMITE kan stoppe dem – drap er hans jobb, og i ’44 går forretningene strålende.

programme.title: The Wraith
programme.desc: Jake blir drept av bøller i nabolaget og vender tilbake som en mystisk skikkelse (The Wraith) for å ta hevn.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell
programme.desc: I år 2029 er en kvinnelig kyberagent på sporet av "Dukkemesteren" – et datavirus som kan invadere kybernetiske hjerner og endre offerets minner.

programme.title: The Little Shop Of Horrors
programme.desc: En butikkmedarbeider oppdager en mystisk plante med en blodtørstig appetitt. Suksess følger, men prisen viser seg å være menneskeliv, og situasjonen eskalerer.

programme.title: True Colors
programme.desc: Mens Tim drømte om å jobbe i justisdepartementet, ønsket Peter å bli en sterk politisk aktør - for enhver pris.

programme.title: Koyaanisqatsi
programme.desc: Liv i ubalanse. Et visuellet tonediktet som gir et avslørende og sjokkerende innblikk om moderne teknologi og hvordan den påvirker mennesker og jorden. Uten fortellerstemme uttrykker filmen seg gjennom bilder og den fantastiske musikken til Philip Glass.

programme.title: Disaster Movie
programme.desc: DISASTER MOVIE fortsetter den komiske nedturen til din yndlingsgruppe med latterlig attraktive 20-åringer. En skjebnesvanger natt prøver de å komme seg i trygghet mens enhver kjent naturkatastrofe, knuser byen og deres vei.

programme.title: Number 17
programme.desc: En gjeng tyver samles i et trygt hus etter et ran, men en detektiv er på sporet deres.

programme.title: Cold War
programme.desc: En lidenskapelig kjærlighetshistorie mellom to personer med forskjellig bakgrunn og temperament, på tross av at de er en dårlig match klarer de ikke å gi slipp på hverandre.

programme.title: Cheers NO: A Ditch in Time
programme.desc: I baren får Sams uskyldige flørt med en attraktiv kunde, Amanda, ham i trøbbel når han ikke skjønner at hun er medlem av Dianes terapigruppe.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Whodunit?
programme.desc: Carla vinner favør og beundring fra Frasiers anerkjente mentor.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Heart Is a Lonely Snipehunter
programme.desc: Gutta gjennomfører en grusom spøk på Frasier mens de er på fisketur.
programme.sub-title: The Heart Is a Lonely Snipehunter

programme.title: Cheers NO: King of the Hill
programme.desc: Sam melder seg frivillig til å spille en veldedighetskamp mot Playboy Playmates.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: Sam kommer tilbake til skolen for å få vitnemålet sitt.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Mail Goes to Jail
programme.desc: Norm setter Cliffs jobb i fare når han tar over jobben for én dag.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Bar Bet
programme.desc: Et gammelt veddemål tvinger Sam til å velge mellom å gifte seg eller miste Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Behind Every Great Man
programme.desc: En skarp journalist besøker Cheers, men mister interessen pga. Sams arroganse.

programme.title: Cheers NO: If Ever I Would Leave You
programme.desc: Nick kommer tilbake for å vinne Carlas kjærlighet på nytt når kona hans forlater ham.
programme.sub-title: If Ever I Would Leave You

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Executive's Executioner
programme.desc: Norm blir tvunget til en forfremmelse som tvinger ham å sparke noen ansatte.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Med mye angst bestemmer Diane seg for å forlate Cheers og reise til Europa med Frasier, som har blitt tilbudt en midlertidig stilling ved universitet i Bologna.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carla ansetter en engelsk kvinne for å fylle Dianes plass mens hun er i Europa.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carla tar hevn på en tidligere rektor som hun forakter.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: I den spennende sesongsfinalen frir Frasier til Diane mens de er i Europa, og ønsker å gifte seg dagen etter.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Birth, Death, Love and Rice
programme.desc: Frasier kommer tilbake til Cheers med nyheten om at Diane har gått i kloster.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Woody Goes Belly Up
programme.desc: Sam og Diane overrasker Woody med besøk av en gammel kjenning.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Someday My Prince Will Come
programme.desc: Diane finner en kåpe, og tror den mystiske eieren er mannen hun alltid har drømt om.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Groom Wore Clearasil
programme.desc: Carlas 16-årige sønn vil gifte seg med kjæresten fra skoletiden.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Diane's Nightmare
programme.desc: Diane er overbevist om at den galne skuespilleren fra fortiden hennes er ute etter å ta henne.

programme.title: Cheers NO: I'll Gladly Pay You Tuesday
programme.desc: Sam prøver å dekke over sannheten når han mister Dianes uvurderlige bok.

programme.title: Cheers NO: 2 Good To Be 4 Reel
programme.desc: Gjengen på Cheers prøver å løfte humøret til Carla når hun legger ut en personlig annonse.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Norm ansetter en privat etterforsker for å finne ut om Vera har en affære.

programme.title: Cheers NO: From Beer To Eternity
programme.desc: Cheers-gjengen utfordrer en rivaliserende bar i en bowlingturnering.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Bar Stoolie
programme.desc: Cliff får vite at farens hans lever et hemmelig liv.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Don Juan Is Hell
programme.desc: Sam er temaet i Dianes forskningsartikkel.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Fools And Their Money
programme.desc: Når Woody blir hekta på tipping, trør Sam inn for å få ham til å innse feilen.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Take My Shirt…Please
programme.desc: Sam innser at baseballdagene hans er over når ingen byr på trøya hans.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Suspicion
programme.desc: Diane stoler ikke på noen når hun er sikker på at hevnen kommer.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Triangle
programme.desc: Diane legger en plan for å redde Frasier.

programme.desc: Cliff inviterer Diane og Carla til et årlig ball, og uventet sier de begge ja.

programme.title: COPS: One, Two, Tree
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends abruptly when the suspect makes a wrong turn, and a nervous man attempts to hide his crime when he thinks no one can see him.

programme.title: COPS: Wake Up Call
programme.desc: A lawbreaker tries to convince the cops that he's a good guy, and deputies smell trouble during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS: Just Hanging Out
programme.desc: A jumpy bicyclist mistakenly reveals more than he had planned, and officers search a darkened building in an attempt to thwart a robbery in progress.

programme.title: COPS: Bail Me Out, Boss
programme.desc: A distressed woman leads the cops to her abusive fiance, and a couple of officers are suspicious when they pull over an overly friendly man.

programme.title: COPS: Thanks for Nothing, Mom
programme.desc: Officers respond to a suspected animal cruelty call, a fight between neighbors turns violent, and deputies question a suspicious group behind a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS: Clueless
programme.desc: A young woman with warrants tries to avoid jail time, deputies confront a hit-and-run suspect, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS: Organized Crime
programme.desc: Emotions run high when a dispute between siblings gets out of hand, a man struggles to keep his story straight with the police, and deputies investigate a domestic incident.

programme.title: COPS: Out of Sight, Out of Mind
programme.desc: The K-9 unit tracks down a man fleeing on foot, a father is left with no choice but to call the cops on his son, and a former gang member is found with a stolen firearm.
programme.sub-title: Out of Sight, Out of Mind

programme.title: COPS: Two Doors Down
programme.desc: A deputy calls for backup when he's outnumbered, a former Marine damages his neighbors' property, and a husband and wife are separated after their vehicle is searched.

programme.title: COPS: One Headlight
programme.desc: A man pulls out all the stops to elude the police, a civilian steps in when she spots a violent crime in progress, and a suspected shoplifter is confronted by officers.

programme.title: COPS: Between a Bush and a Hard Place
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit switches gears when the driver flees on foot, an altercation causes tension between neighbors, and a driver is irate when officers search his passenger.
programme.sub-title: Between a Bush and a Hard Place

programme.title: COPS: Manic Monday
programme.desc: A wanted man attempts to hide at his grandmother's house, police arrest a suspect driving a stolen vehicle, and officers call animal control for an injured dog.

programme.title: COPS: Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
programme.desc: Deputies pull a man from a devastating car wreck after a high-speed chase, officers apprehend and question a robbery suspect, and a wanted man tries to flee from police.
programme.sub-title: Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back

programme.title: COPS: Heat of the Moment
programme.desc: A parolee leads deputies on a high-speed chase, police respond to a domestic disturbance call, and an officer helps frustrated citizens settle their differences.

programme.title: COPS: Cookies and Contraband
programme.desc: A detective is injured after chasing a man driving a stolen car, a bar fight ends with a couple in handcuffs, and an officer finds a variety of items during a vehicle search.

programme.title: COPS: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: An alleged lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation, and officers question a colorful trio of suspects.

programme.title: COPS: Bikini Brawl
programme.desc: Officers are called when a mother's job hunt takes a turn for the worse, and deputies confront a nervous man with a lot of bad habits.

programme.title: COPS: A Man Without a Plan
programme.desc: A young man receives a wake-up call when police catch him breaking the law, and officers play peacemakers after a board game sparks a family feud.

programme.title: COPS: The Truth Is Key
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS: Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: A defiant motorist is shocked when his mother sides with the law, and deputies discover a man wearing a bizarre costume during a routine traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS: The Naked Truth
programme.desc: An evasive driver blames his girlfriend for his behavior, a pregnant woman makes some questionable choices, and a robbery suspect finds comfort in coming clean.

programme.title: COPS: Rock Star
programme.desc: Officers intervene when a dispute between neighbors gets heated, suspects of a shooting lead police on a high-speed pursuit, and a domestic argument gets out of hand.

programme.title: COPS: Window of Opportunity
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an armed suspect, the cops are called when a man damages his neighbor's window, and deputies investigate a parking garage known for illegal activity.

programme.title: COPS: Mommy's Tears
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS: Running Scared
programme.desc: Suspected jewelry thieves attempt a daring escape during a pursuit, a man gives officers a challenge during his arrest, and a traffic stop puts a marriage in jeopardy.

programme.title: COPS: Time to Climb
programme.desc: A couple flee a routine traffic stop. An intoxicated woman climbs a tree. Construction workers are pulled over for a hand-to-hand transaction.

programme.title: COPS: Dine and Flee
programme.desc: A sting operation is set up to catch narcotics dealers. A man flees a restaurant without paying his four-hundred-dollar tab. A traffic stop for a tint violation leads to a felony arrest for narcotics.

programme.title: COPS: Gas up and Run!
programme.desc: A man is tasered twice after struggling with two deputies. A gas station fight ends in a foot chase. A deputy pulls over a pair of quarreling lovers after they run a stop sign.

programme.title: COPS: Settled with a Pipe
programme.desc: A man attacking a woman is tackled by an officer. A vehicle is pulled over for a drug deal in progress. A woman smashes a car window with a pipe in a fit of road rage.

programme.title: COPS: Dyed in the Wool
programme.desc: A suspect selling narcotics takes off on foot. A bank robber leaves his wallet in an abandoned money bag. Multiple domestic violence calls end in arrests.

programme.title: COPS: The House Always Wins
programme.desc: A suspect runs from an illegal gambling game claiming shots were fired. A man is caught trespassing on school grounds. A male driver wearing a halter top is pulled over for a minor traffic violation.

programme.title: COPS: Allergy Season
programme.desc: A drunk driver rams into a pursuing police car. A man on a bike flees an area known for drug activity on a bike. A sniffling man attempts to hide a baggie with narcotics under his shirt.

programme.title: COPS: Yard Work
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a call of a man shooting a gun in his front yard. Officers are called to a domestic dispute over an wrinkly infant's shirt. Four armed and suspicious men are spotted by deputies.

programme.title: COPS: Keep it Down!
programme.desc: An officer is forced to subdue a suspect with his baton. A man asks deputies to give him back his drugs before taking him to jail. A man causes a disturbance at an apartment complex.

programme.title: COPS: Hot Potato
programme.desc: A man tosses his stash after being pulled over. Officers question two men in a fight who live with the same woman. A man says his shorts are from a thrift store after drugs are found in them.

programme.title: COPS: Nerves of Noodles
programme.desc: A man tells deputies the pants he has on aren't his. Officers are called to the scene of men firing an ak-47. A nervous driver fesses up to the deputy who stopped him.

programme.title: COPS: What's Your Deductible?
programme.desc: Detectives chase a suspect who wrecks his car. Police are called when a man headbutts his neighbor. Officers tend to a woman punched in the face by her husband while on the bus.

programme.title: COPS: Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: A suspect flees police in a truck over a misdemeanor traffic warrant. A man denies hitting his wife who has a bloody nose. A man denies ownership of his shorts when deputies find drugs in them.

programme.title: Star Trek: Nemesis
programme.desc: Sett kursen mot en galakse med enestående action og eventyr når kaptein Jean-Luc Picard (Patrick Stewart) og hans Starship-mannskap kjempet mot en farlig motstander... Som har en overraskende kobling til Picard!

programme.title: Star Trek I: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: Når et uidentifisert romvesen ødelegger tre kraftfulle Klingon-kryssere, vender kaptein James T. Kirk (William Shatner) tilbake til det nylig ombyggede U.S.S. Enterprise(tm) for å ta kommandoen.

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: Det er 2200-tallet. Føderasjonens U.S.S. Enterprise er på et treningsoppdrag og det virker som om admiral James T. Kirk (William Shatner) er resignert på at inspeksjonen kan bli den siste romferden i sin karriere. Men Khan er tilbake.

programme.title: Star Trek 3 - Jakten På Spock
programme.desc: Admiral Kirks seier over Khan og dannelsen av Genesis-planeten er tomme seiere. Spock er død og McCoy drives uforklarlig mot galskap. Så gir et overraskelsesbesøk fra Sarek, Spocks far, en forbløffende avsløring.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Mannskapet på Federation-skipet Enterprise tilkalles til Nimbus III, Planeten for intergalaktisk fred. De skal forhandle over en bortføring, men får vite at kidnapperen er en slektning av Spock.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: Etter årevis med krig, nærmer Federation og Klingon-imperiet seg en fredssamling når et Klingon-skip nesten blir ødelagt i et tilsynelatende angrep fra Enterprise. Begge verdener forbereder seg på det som kan bli deres dødeligste møte så langt.

programme.title: Star Trek VII: Generations
programme.desc: Picards eneste håp for fremtiden er Nexus... og en legendarisk kaptein fra fortiden.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact
programme.desc: Etter en episk kamp mot borgene (cybernetisk forsterkede livsformer), følger kaptein Picard og hans besetning borgene tilbake til 2000-tallet for å hindre at de endrer jordens tidslinje og den første utenomjordiske kontakten.

programme.title: Star Trek IX: Insurrection
programme.desc: Når mannskapet på Enterprise får vite om føderasjonens plott mot innbyggerne av en unik planet, starter kaptein Picard et åpent opprør.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot At Point-Blank: The Aurelie Barbot Affair
programme.desc: On December 20, 2012, in Val d'Izé (Ille-et-Vilaine), Aurélie Barbot, 29, was killed on her doorstep with a bullet to the head.
programme.sub-title: Shot At Point-Blank: The Aurelie Barbot Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)
programme.desc: Marc Van Beers, a 36-year old Brussels tax lawyer, dies in a road accident while on honeymoon. His wife Aurore is unharmed by the accident.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Laurence Dromard Case
programme.desc: Sylvain Dromard finds the body of his wife Laurence lying in a pool of blood in the kitchen. The crime was particularly violent and the theory of a burglary that went wrong is soon excluded. But investigators don't understand who could want her dead.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Young Women Massacred: The Leconte Affair
programme.desc: On July 8, 2002, near Amiens, a farmer discovers the lifeless body of a young woman, Patricia Leclercq, on his field.
programme.sub-title: Two Young Women Massacred: The Leconte Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot In the While Sleeping (Richard Alessandri Case)
programme.desc: On the night of July 16, 2000, the life of Edwige Alessandri changed forever. She made a frantic emergency call in the town of Carpentras. She recounted that some men burst into her room and shot her husband while he slept.
programme.sub-title: Shot In the While Sleeping (Richard Alessandri Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Josiane Bézard Case
programme.desc: On the morning of January 9th 2014, Josiane Bézard, 53 years old, drives her son to the Manosque's train station, and then vanishes.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Julein Thevenet Case
programme.desc: On January 27th 2014, in Somme-Suippe in the Marne, Sophie Thevenet discovers her dead husband's body in the garage.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Raphael Lomoro Case
programme.desc: On June 12th 2007, in Berhen-lès-Forbach, in Moselle, a young woman reports the disappearance of her brother Raphaël Lomoro, 46 years old vanilla producer living in Madagascar.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Key to the Enigma (Farid Ouzzane Case)
programme.desc: On July 13, 2011, two boaters retrieved a suitcase that was floating in the bay of Lorient. Inside, they discovered the tied up corpse of a man. In order to identify this unknown man, whose face was unrecognizable.
programme.sub-title: The Key to the Enigma (Farid Ouzzane Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Corpse In The Cemetery: The Frederic Butanowicz Case
programme.desc: On November 9, 2011, the body of a man was found near the Courcelles-le-Comte cemetery (Pas-de-Calais).
programme.sub-title: A Corpse In The Cemetery: The Frederic Butanowicz Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deadly Trap For the Interior Designer - Guy Georges Case
programme.desc: On April 18th 2014, in Visé, Belgium, policemen are informed that gunshots had been fired on the street.
programme.sub-title: Deadly Trap For the Interior Designer - Guy Georges Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Audrey Jouannet Case
programme.desc: September 16 2005. The lifeless body of Audrey Jouannet, 24, is found hidden under the bed in her small apartment in Soisy-sur-Seine. It soon becomes apparent that the young woman has been tortured at length before being strangled.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Valerie Bary Case)
programme.desc: On Friday, March 26, 2004, in the region of Dijon, Laurent Bary came home from his work to discover the lifeless body of his wife, Valerie, bathing in a pool of blood.
programme.sub-title: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Valerie Bary Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Triple Murders in Vise
programme.desc: On May 17th 2005, a body is discovered in a forest of Sucy-en-Brie; Christophe Belle, 40 years old, a renowned pastry cook.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Mathilde Croguenne Case
programme.desc: In the early hours of the morning, Mathilde Croguennec, 18, attending \"Teknival\" in Brittany, is found at the foot of a tree with her throat cut. Investigators face the task of finding the killer among the 43,000 participants of this festival

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: In Search of SK1 - Akira Ojima Case
programme.desc: On October 13th 1996, the body of young Angélique Dumetz, 18 years old, is recovered down a ditch in Oise forest. An important clue is found on the crime scene.
programme.sub-title: In Search of SK1 - Akira Ojima Case

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 609
programme.desc: For 21 år siden havnet Allan i en voldsom sykkelulykke. Allan er merket for livet, og til tross for flere operasjoner sitter han igjen med arr i ansiktet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Vi møter Jeanette, som føler seg som en forsøkskanin etter en rekke mislykkede operasjoner. Maria måtte fjerne implantatene sine, og er nå uten bryster. Shahin har smerter etter en ansiktsløftning.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 311
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi bl.a. Maria, som etter 11 operasjoner har fått det hun kaller verdens styggeste bryster. Rose fikk en bredere nese etter at hun opererte den.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi Jette, som har valgt ikke å amme sine tre barn på grunn av silikonbrystene sine, og Charlotte som fremdeles har kjøttsår på innsiden av låret etter fettsuging.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 103
programme.desc: Ivana endte ikke bare opp med å bruke en million kroner i USA, men hun ble også offer for en fatal beslutning, tatt av legene mens hun lå i narkose

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 604
programme.desc: Gjennom hele livet har 61 år gamle Lis ønsket å forandre sine små bryster. Derfor valgte hun å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon, men kort tid etter opplevde hun at det påvirket sexlivet hennes.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 903
programme.desc: Nanna har hatt flere brystoperasjoner og korrigeringer, men sitter nå igjen med deformerte, harde bryster. På grunn av operasjonene vil hun ikke at noen skal se henne naken.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 406
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi Anita som våkner opp med større bryster enn hun hadde avtalt med kirurgen og nå føler seg som en mini-versjon av Linse Kessler.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: For tre år siden valgte Sarah å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon i Polen, men etter operasjonen syntes hun brystene hennes så ut som to kaffeposer med implantater.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 613
programme.desc: Når sønnen endelig blir frisk, føler Charlott seg ikke lenger som seg selv, og hun velger derfor å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon. Men resultatet ble en stor skuffelse.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 407
programme.desc: Vi møter Maria, som etter en brystoperasjon fikk store abscesser og hull helt inn til implantatet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 203
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Pia, som fikk stafylokokker etter en brystforstørrende operasjon og måtte gå i seks måneder med bare ett implantat.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 701
programme.desc: Etter en alvorlig ulykke, hvor Dan faller ned fra et tak og lander på ansiktet, opereres han to ganger for å rette opp nesen sin.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 510
programme.desc: Etter fødselen velger Camilla å operere brystene. Det viser seg imidlertid at kirurgen ved en feil har brukt tråder som ikke er selvoppløsende, og Camilla lever i dag med store sår.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 610
programme.desc: Sportsgale Jeanette ble inspirert for 12 år siden av en trend i treningsstudioet, hvor vennene hennes fikk forstørret brystene. I motsetning til venninnene liker hun ikke de nye, store puppene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: I 2010 fikk Birthe satt inn saltvannsimplantater i stedet for de vanlige silikonimplantatene. 5 år senere våkner hun til et skremmende syn - det ene implantatet hennes er borte.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 605
programme.desc: Når Annika ble 30 år, fikk hun penger til en skjønnhetsoperasjon av mannen sin. Paret reiser sammen til Litauen, men allerede på operasjonsdagen oppdager Annika at den litauiske kirurgen ikke gjorde det de hadde avtalt.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 702
programme.desc: Jeanett bryster henger etter at hun har født to barn, og hun bestemmer seg for å ta et brystløft og implantater. Men operasjonen blir en skuffelse for Jeanett.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 801
programme.desc: For 25 år siden var Susanne involvert i en voldsom trafikkulykke som vansiret ansiktet hennes. Siden ulykken har hun vært gjennom mer enn ti operasjoner, men føler likevel at hun ser ut som et monster.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 611
programme.desc: Etter å ha ammet over en lenger periode får Pernille slappe bryster, og hun velger derfor å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon. Men i dag er hun så lei seg over resultatet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.
