programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Family Is Rocked!
programme.desc: Geordiene er tilbake i tegnefilm, og får sjokk da et kjent fjes kommer tilbake. Bethan og Beau settes på prøve mens Chloes og Sams forhold holder på å bli bedre. Sophie må fatte et vanskelig valg.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: Nathan besøker Sophie for å forstå hvorfor hun dro. Scott forteller gjengen at Anna arrangerer en singelkveld. Nathan Tasher i vei! Bethan ser seg ikke som singel, men det gjør Beau. Pinlig! Alt går skikkelig galt og Beau slår opp.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Beau & Bethan Back On!
programme.desc: Visse nykommere irriterer seg over at Nat er så overbeskyttende. Nathan danner en vennegruppe med de andre singeltons-ene, Tahlia & Alex. Sam & Chloe har det mye bedre etter en pinlig dag. Beau ordner opp med Bethan.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Cardiff Carnage!
programme.desc: Anna sier til gjengen at de skal dra til Cardiff. Beau er forventningsfull fordi alle kommer til å treffe broren hans, Harvey, som bor der. Men det gjør Bethan nervøs. Familien har det fint i Wales og Tahlia kliner med Harvey.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Dizzy Heights!
programme.desc: Geordierne har hjemmefest! Det er masse gøy og klining på gang. Beau foretrekker Bethan fremfor Abbie. Dette fører til en krangel mellom Chloe og Nathan - igjen! Scott syns lagånden bør styrkes så de rappellerer.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Fight Night!
programme.desc: Nathan arrangerer en overraskelsesfest for sin singelbestevenn, Tahila. Aaron ringer huset og inviterer familien som støtte på hans første MMA-kamp i Newcastle. Alle stiller opp for Aaron, og familien drar i svært godt humør.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Meet The Newbies
programme.desc: Den nye Geordie Shore-serien begynner snart, men først har Scotty samlet det meste av gjengen for å prate om showet. Samt å treffe de siste fire tilskuddene, håndplukket av ham som folk som alle karakterene vil feste med.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Shake Ups & Break Ups!
programme.desc: Alt er ikke bra i Toon! Chloe og Sam har slått opp og gjengen er urolige for hvordan det kommer til å påvirke familien. James og Abbie er tilbake i huset, men første kveld slutter i katastrofe når Beau sier til Bethan at det er slutt.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Give It Another Go!
programme.desc: Sam forstår at han må sette seg og snakke igjennom tingene med Chloe, og forlater huset for en oppriktig og ærlig prat. Til slutt avgjør de å gi tingene en ny sjanse, men nyheten faller ikke bra ut hos resten av huset.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Tensions Keep Rising!
programme.desc: Chloe konfronterer jentene om at de ikke støtter henne i å gjenoppta forholdet med Sam. Sam gir Chloe en overraskelse, men oppførselen under guttekvelden fører til at de slår opp igjen! Abbie forteller James at hun så Chloe gå med en fyr på Ibiza.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Party in Portugal!
programme.desc: Sam fatter en stor avgjørelse når gjengen får høre at de skal i vei til Portugal. Tross dette lever familien som best de kan og fester på Algarve. Men spenningen mellom Bethan, Beau og Abbie truer med å koke over og ødelegge moroa.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Agg on the Algarve!
programme.desc: Bethan og Abbies krangel påvirker huset og alt tar av da Nat kaller Bethan og Beaus forhold 'forgiftet'. Men på ekte Geordie-stil legger familien det bak seg, blir sittene fast i sangria og river opp strippen.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Fun at the Fair!
programme.desc: Gjengen er tilbake fra Portugal, men Sam har forlatt huset, noe som får Chloe til å tro at det er slutt for alltid. Familien tar helt av i Newcastles største fornøyelsespark og Beau spør endelig Bethan om hun vil bli kjæresten hans offisielt.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Geordies Do the Great Outdoors!
programme.desc: Chloe besøker Sam og de gjør fremskritt i forholdet, mens de andre vil gå ut kledd som motsatt kjønn. Gjengen drar på camping og blir angrepet av mygg. James bestemmer seg for å fortelle Sam om Chloes kyss på Ibiza.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Breaking Point
programme.desc: James forteller Sam om Chloes kyss på Ibiza, og helvete er løs når Sam konfronterer henne. Chloe tror ikke at Abbie avslørte hemmeligheten, for det var bare et kyss. Men Sam ser det ikke slik og forlater huset for godt.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Beau's Birthday!
programme.desc: Chloe og Sam er ute av huset og gjengen konsentrerer seg om å more seg. Beau får en husfest med jungeltema - den er vill! James og Beau overrasker Nathan ved å invitere nettdaten hans, Tommy fra Amsterdam, over til Newcastle.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Serious Send Off!
programme.desc: Det er den siste hele dagen i huset, og gjengen forbereder en 'Big One'! Nathan lar Bethan gi ham voksning av baken. Nat lager et farvelmåltif til familien og Chloe blir med alle for siste kveld på Toon - det blir stilig!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Get This Party Started!
programme.desc: Geordierne er spente på å komme tilbake til huset og de føeste er single. De ønsker to nykommere, Amelia og Ant velkomne, og viser dem hvordan de fester. Alt er kos og moro helt til Nathan og Beau kommer nære hverandre. Alt for nære for Bethan.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Family Friction!
programme.desc: Gjengen gleder seg over å bli kjent med nykommerne. Arbeidet tar en vri da Anna sender dem for å levere en unnskyldning fra en festløve. Og alt tar av da Chloe ignorerer Nathans råd om å komme for nære den nye gutten, Ant.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: It's Fright Night!
programme.desc: Chloe føler mindre for Ant, men han tror han har sjans etter at hun lot ham være i senga si. Gjengen blir skremt sanseløse av en tur i skogen fredag kveld. Abbie og Chloe tvinges til å snakke sammen for første gang på lenge.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Jersey Shore Reunion
programme.desc: Hver sommer kommer tusenvis av unge til Jersey Shore for å delta i østkystens overgangsritual: The Shore House. Jersey Shore viser dette fenomenet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 606
programme.desc: Deena forteller om da hun ble arrestert, Jenni og Rogers forhold analyseres, og Vinny forteller åpent om sin fordel.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 608
programme.desc: Deena og Sam starter en kjempekrangel på sofaen etter å ha sett noen provoserende klipp fra denne sesongen. Og Vinni feirer sin avgjørelse om å gå inn i sølibatet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 610
programme.desc: I en spesiell guttekveld på sofaen snakker MVP og Ronnie om Mike og Paulas brudd - som møtte hverandre i Jersey Shore - og om hvorfor alle gutta var så tøffe mot Jionni.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Jersey Shore Best of Reunions
programme.desc: Amy Paffrath viser alle høydepunkter og lavmålene fra tidligere gjenforeninger, inkludert noen opptak som aldri er vist før.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: A New Family
programme.desc: Sommeren på Jersey Shore starter når åtte personer flytter inn i sommerhuset. Romantikken blomstrer mellom Sammy og Mike, men kan bli spolert når gutta inviterer tre tilfeldige jenter i boblebadet med dem.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Tanned Triangle
programme.desc: Snooki føler seg fortsatt utstøtt og vurderer å reise sin vei. Første kveld på klubben blir flørtete, så kjærestene hjemme har kanskje grunn til bekymring. Et trekantdrama truer med å splitte huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Good Riddance
programme.desc: Trekanten blir mer intens når Ronnie tar Sammy i å gi nummeret sitt til en annen gutt. En deltaker velger å forlate The Shore for godt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Paulie og Mike må sjonglere flere grupper med jenter. Det blir slåsskamp i baren, og en av deltakerne blir slått ned.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Just Another Day at the Shore
programme.desc: Med støtte fra de fleste av de andre er Snooki på bedringens vei. Ronnies familie kommer på besøk, og Sammi ønsker å gjøre et godt førsteinntrykk. JWoww blir lei folkene i klubben og havner i slåsskamp.
programme.sub-title: Just Another Day at the Shore

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Boardwalk Blowups
programme.desc: Mike ber jenter til huset, og situasjonen kommer ut av kontroll. Snooki havner i slåsskamp igjen. Ronnie havner også i bråk, og Sammi begynner å tvile på forholdet deres.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: What Happens in the AC
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Atlantic City, der moro blir til alvor idet Mike støter fra seg både Snooki og Jwoww. En av deltakerne avslører at hun har hatt spiseforstyrrelser.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Shot
programme.desc: Sommeren går mot slutten, men dramaet er ikke over. Pauly får en stalker, og en deltaker havner i fengsel etter en slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: That's How The Shore Goes
programme.desc: Ronnie slipper ut, og Snooki får trøst etter et møte med eksen. Gjengen tar farvel med The Shore, men ikke uten en siste tur i boblebadet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Season 1 Reunion
programme.desc: Man får svar på mange spørsmål når Snooki, The Situation, Jwoww, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi og Vinny kommer tilbake for mer krangling og innsikt i hva som faktisk foregikk i strandhuset i Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Goin' South
programme.desc: Gjengen skal til Miami! Mike, Pauly D, Snooki og JWoww kjører, mens de andre tar fly. Tidligere deltaker Angelina skaper drama. Ronnie og Sammi er blitt single, men det er fortsatt komplisert.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Hangover
programme.desc: Sammi vil vite hva Ronnie gjorde på klubben kvelden før, men ingen vil si det. Angelina avbryter Paulys spill, og den vanligvis så rolige Pauly D viser en helt ny side.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Creepin'
programme.desc: Angelina ber jentene om unnskyldning. Mike, Vinny og Pauly leker med granater i boblebadet, og Ron fortsatt har hemmeligheter for Sammi.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Breaking Up
programme.desc: Sammi og Ronnie har problemer, og Sammi prøver å slå opp, men tar Ronnie tilbake etter 5 minutter. Jentene legger en plan for å fortelle Sammi sannheten om kjæresten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Letter
programme.desc: Sammi finner det 'anonyme' brevet fra Snooki og Jenni, og nå er det virkelig slutt - i hvert fall en stund. Mike, Vinny og Pauly har hendene fulle med fire jenter på én kveld.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Not So Shore
programme.desc: Det anonyme brevet skaper spenning mellom jentene, og det ender i slåsskamp. Etter enda en natt med Vinny avslører Snooki en ikke så lite kjent 'hemmelighet'.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Sleeping with the Enemy
programme.desc: Gjengen må takle konsekvensene av jentenes krangel. Angelina dater Jose fra klubben, og Jenni og Snooki kler seg i hjemmelagde beskyttelsesdrakter for å rydde opp før Snookis date.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike truer med å fortelle Jose om Angelina og Vinny. Vinnys familie kommer på besøk. Og Vinny og Pauly finner drømmejentene, men en vil få knust hjertet sitt.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 202
programme.desc: Erik Lundman i Lundmans transportfirma sliter med en kloakktank, postbud Stephanie gjør en feil og taper tid under en hastetur, og spesialtransportør Jari får utrolig nok tre punkteringer.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 203
programme.desc: Jesper er bekymret for å komme for sent til avlastningen i Danmark. Tove får en dårlig start på dagen og krasjer med tømmerbilen sin. Og Jari havner i feil havn under lossing.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 204
programme.desc: Louise har en uvanlig tung forsendelse med to ismaskiner som skal fraktes til en ishockeybane utenfor Stockholm. Robin, som kjører biler verdt millioner, har en kjøretur med en veldig fin Cobra fra 1965.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 205
programme.desc: Familiebedriften Tösse wedins har en ny kunde som trenger den erfarne tømmerbilsjåføren og administrerende direktøren i selskapet, "Höna", til å kjøre en lastebil.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 301
programme.desc: Anton og broren transporterer en gravemaskin på den lokale "Dødens vei". Sam, en miljøarbeider, er opprørt over det moderne menneskets livsstil. Og Tove drar til en skog for å samle tømmer.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 302
programme.desc: I Hässleholm skal Jörgen kjøre en bro med en uvanlig form, der du virkelig må tenke på å løfte hvis du ikke vil at sikkerhetsanordningene skal svikte.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 303
programme.desc: Stephanie guider oss gjennom vanskelighetene med å være leveringssjåfør i Stockholm. Anders kjører et stort elektrisk hus fra Öjebyn til Boliden, og det må ikke få riper.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 304
programme.desc: Anders er på vei til Boliden med en 20 tonn tung og 20 meter lang container, men til tross for forberedelser havner han på feil vei. Elin blir skikkelig stresset når hun havner midt i rushtrafikken i Stockholm.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 305
programme.desc: I Kristinehamn i Sverige er Jörgen i ferd med å laste en 135 tonn tung barktønne da et høyt smell stopper lasteprosessen. Spylebilsjåføren Magnus og kollegaen Bruno sjekker et overvannsrør.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 401
programme.desc: Å finne frem i skogen er lettere sagt enn gjort. For den nyankomne tømmerbilsjåføren Linda betyr det at hun kommer på etterskudd i et allerede stramt tidsskjema.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 402
programme.desc: I Gøteborg flytter spesialtransportøren Jonathan campinghytter, og været er ikke på hans side. I Stockholm er rotter et problem, og Max, en søppelmann, vil helst slippe å møte dem.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 403
programme.desc: I Stockholm tømmer Max søppeldunker i kjendistette nabolag. Jörgen transporterer en 25 tonn tung gryte i Skåne, og veien dit er både smal og ujevn.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 404
programme.desc: Spesialtransportøren Johan transporterer 30 meter lange trebjelker. Slamsugeren Magnus tar seg av en pumpegrop, en risikofylt jobb på grunn av de farlige gassene som produseres.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anton kjører en grusknuser oppe i Norrland, og Amanda er på et kloakkrenseanlegg med kranbilen sin for å hjelpe til med å tømme en silo.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 406
programme.desc: Max har byttet ut byluften med skjærgården, og dagens oppdrag er å tømme søppeldunker på Ingarö. To termoser med kaffe og Emanuel er klar for en hel dag i skogen.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 407
programme.desc: Ingenting kan gå galt når Jörgen kjører en 70 tonns kran fra Värnamo til Helsingborg. Mickan kjører tømmer for første gang. Olivia transporterer kalver, men kalvene rømmer!

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 408
programme.desc: Mattias kjører over 100 kviger og okser til beite. Tove laster tømmer i skogene i Småland. Jörgen kjører en transformator, men alt fungerer ikke som det skal!

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 501
programme.desc: Jörgen kjører en 50 tonns transformator i Skåne – men problemene avløser hverandre. Mattias har reist til den finske grensen for å frakte alpakkaer. Emina leverer fisk i Skåne.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 502
programme.desc: Pappa Roine og Mattias laster høyballer – men plutselig stopper hjullasteren. Linda leverer drinker rundt i Stockholm – og benytter anledningen til å besøke forloveden Magnus. Piraten legger asfalt.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 503
programme.desc: Biltransportøren Robin må være ekstra forsiktig når han skal frakte en dyr Lincoln på lasteplanet! Det samme gjelder Micke som skal kjøre et dyrt spabad til Uddevalla.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: What Happens In Vegas + Fun And Games (Episodes 1 & 2)
programme.desc: Thirty-four finalists travel to Caesar’s Palace in Las Vegas where they being their inner-goddess to the surface for their very first photoshoot.
programme.sub-title: What Happens In Vegas + Fun And Games (Episodes 1 & 2)

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Do You Light The Way You Look?
programme.desc: The girls head to Bergdorff’s in New York City for makeovers! After receiving their new looks, the girls do their first photo session with Nigel Barker and must light themselves up.
programme.sub-title: Do You Light The Way You Look?

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: New York’s Finest
programme.desc: The girls learn runway etiquette with Miss J and walk the runway in a Jill Stuart fashion show. Two previous Top Model contestants surprise the girls and offer runway advice.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Put Your Best Face Forward
programme.desc: Cycle three contestant and model Tocarra drops by to host a slumber party & teaches the girls some helpful hints for a career in the modeling business.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Here’s Your Test
programme.desc: The house is divided and confrontational after last week’s shocking admission from one girl at the elimination panel.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Acting Like A Model
programme.desc: The girls are surprised to learn they will be working opposite Clay Aiken during an acting challenge. Cycle 11 winner, McKey, stops by to offer support while the girls prepare for their CoverGirl commercial.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Cycle 12 Rewind
programme.desc: Catch up with the cycle 12 girls in this look back at never-before-seen footage. Brand new moments full of tears, laughter and some catfights.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Take Me To A Photo Shoot
programme.desc: The remaining girls freak when Grammy Award-winning recording artist Ciara shows up at their apartment to offer some words of advice.
programme.sub-title: Take Me To A Photo Shoot

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Amazing Model Race
programme.desc: The girls land in an exotic overseas destination and immediately test their navigation skills during a scavenger hunt around the city.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Let’s Go See The City
programme.desc: The five remaining girls learn they will have to go on go-sees with five different designers around the city.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Take Me To The Jungle
programme.desc: The ladies rescue a stranded Tyra Banks on their way to the Brazilian Jungle for this week’s photoshoot.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: America’s Next Top Model Is…
programme.desc: Three semi-finalists complete their CoverGirl commercial and ultimately, only two are left standing.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Fortress of Fierceness
programme.desc: The president of Wilhelmina Models gives the girls some real-world advice on what makes a model. Lauren Conrad guest judges the girl's photos at the Santa Anita Race Track.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Make Me Tall
programme.desc: The ladies meet with Miss J to perfect their runway strut for designer Kevan Hall's fashion show. They learn to cheat their own proportions in the next fashion shoot.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Take My Photo, Tyra!
programme.desc: The girls must work extra hard to stand out, literally, when Tyra wraps them up in vibrant fabrics and photographs them during this week's photo challenge. This week's guest judge is supermodel China Chow, a famous petite model.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Dance With Me
programme.desc: The girls go on a surprise trip to Vegas for the Cirque du Soleil-themed photo shoot. Benny Ninja teaches the nine remaining models how to dance without expressions on their faces.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Petite Ninja Warriors
programme.desc: The girls must navigate themselves around Los Angeles for an afternoon of go-sees. This week's photoshoot has a martial arts-inspired theme that has the girls hanging, literally, by a wire.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Interview 101
programme.desc: The girls put their interviewing skills to the test as they interview 90210's Jessica Lowndes on the set of The Insider. The ladies are surprised to learn they must write their own scripts for their CoverGirl commercials.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: Dive Deeper
programme.desc: The ladies explore the cliffs of Hawaii and are forced to strike a modelesque pose while jumping into the water. Later the girls learn to pose while deep in the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: All the boxing action.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Miguel Cotto defends his WBA welterweight title against Shane Mosley; Cotto enters the ring with a 30-0 record.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Watch Devin Haney vs. Zaur Abdullaev on DAZN, the home of Boxing.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Ryan Garcia takes to the ring on Valentine's Day hoping to break the heart of his opponent Francisco Fonseca.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: WBA gold welterweight title bout. From July 24, 2020 at the Fantasy Springs Casino in Indo, Calif.
programme.sub-title: 2020: Vergil Ortiz Jr. vs Samuel Vargas

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: The undefeated Ryan Garcia (22-0) looked to return to the ring with a bang, as he faced Javier Fortuna (37-3-1].

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: En spirituell reise
programme.desc: Beavis ser ansiktet til Jesus i en nacho-chips. Det sender ham på en episk reise for å finne svar på det store spørsmålet - "Hvorfor får jeg aldri pult?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Nose Bleed / Vaya Con Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head tries some sadistic home remedies in an attempt to stop Beavis's nosebleed. / When Beavis turns into Cornholio in Burger World, Immigration Officials take him in as a possible illegal alien and try to make sense of his gibberish.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Give Blood / Beware of the Butt (aka Drive-In #1)
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head explore the career possibilities in selling blood. / While causing mischief at a drive-in movie theatre, Beavis & Butt-head experience a new phase of the moon.
programme.sub-title: Give Blood / Beware of the Butt (aka Drive-In #1)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)
programme.desc: Suffering from nasty colds, Beavis & Butt-head visit a doctor in hopes of glomming a prescription remedy. / Beavis & Butt-head's school assignment is to write a poem in the venerated Haiku format.
programme.sub-title: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Figure Drawing / Date Bait
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get to look at real nudes. / The return of Lolita and Tanqueray! Beavis and Butt-head go on their first date, well, almost.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: To teite menn / Fredagsgalskap
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head oppfyller sin samfunnsplikt som jurymedlemmer./ Beavis og Butt-Head tror feilaktig at de har byttet kropp.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Car Wash / Kidnapped
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head attempt to make some money washing cars. / Beavis & Butt-head decide that kidnapping Stewart would be a quick way to some cash.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Politically Correct / True Crime
programme.desc: To better understand their female classmates, Beavis & Butt-head must get in touch with their feelings. Huh huh, he said "touch." / Beavis & Butt-head unknowingly star in their favorite crime reenactment shows.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap
programme.desc: Beavis starts mimicing Butt-Head / A quiet day in Highland, Texas / Our duo enrolls in a fitness class
programme.sub-title: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Scared Straight / Citizen Butt-head Part 2
programme.desc: To teach them that crime doesn't pay, Beavis & Butt-head's principal sends them to prison for a day. Bad idea. / Beavis & Butt-head and President Clinton explore chaos theory together.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sporting goods / Cow tipping
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head decide to get athletic gear supporters for gym class / The duo venture out on a quest for cow tipping

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den rare jenta / Tidsreisen
programme.desc: Beavis møter en hemmelig beundrer på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head krysser frem og tilbake over delstatslinjen inn i Mountain Time Zone og tror de kan reise i tiden.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Manners Suck / Pipe Of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Van Driessen gives his class a lesson in manners that no one will ever forget. He punches out the etiquette teacher. / Butt-head gets stuck in a construction site pipe, a la Baby Jessica.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nyren / Den gode handling
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis ødelegger nyren og en donor fra hans fortid redder dagen./ Beavis og Butt-Head utfører sin første gode gjerning ved å ha DDT i bowlen på skoledansen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head miss the schoolbus home / The duo makes a Late Night Show / Beavis and Butt-Head are invited to play football
programme.sub-title: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Tak / Elv
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head blir sittende fast på taket av Tom Andersons hus./ Beavis og Butt-Head seiler på dekk i en elv og ender opp på sjøen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Crush / Young, Gifted & Crude
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head want to hang with a "really cool' bunch of delinquents. / Beavis & Butt-head spend some time with the school's gifted class. Not much time.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Choke / Career day
programme.desc: Eating chicken can be hazardous / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support
programme.desc: After the Manager explains that Workers Compensation pays you for getting injured on the job, Butt-head sets out to injure Beavis / A Vampire craze hits the high school / Beavis and Butt-Head misinterpret what it means to ask a man for his daughter's hand
programme.sub-title: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Killing Time / Dude, a Reward
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head's worst fears are realized when they have to kill two hours, until something good comes on TV. / Images of Beavis and Butt-head grace the walls of a photo gallery after they find a lost camera and put it to creative use.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Teen Talk / vs.the Vending Machine
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head join Captain Dick Jackman on his Sunday morning program, "rapping" about their problems. / The vending machine wins.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Fluktrommet/Den viktige
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å løse Fluktromgåten, bare for å bli fanget på badet. / Beavis møter sin største helt - Ild.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Snille Butt-Head/ Hjemmehjelp
programme.desc: Butt-Head får medisin for sin aggresjon mot Beavis og blir litt for snill./ Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head går tom for ølpenger, så Beavis må finne seg en jobb.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shopping cart / Die Fly, Die! / Drinking Butt-ies
programme.desc: Our duo find out that accidents can lead to money / Beavis and Butt-Head get annoyed at a fly / After a beating by Todd, they become best friends over beer
programme.sub-title: Shopping cart / Die Fly, Die! / Drinking Butt-ies

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Virtuelt vannvidd / Utestengt
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head tar på seg solbriller og tror de er virtual reality-briller./ Beavis og Butt-Head blir låst ute av huset og ødelegger det når de prøver å komme seg inn.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Radio Sweethearts / The Great Cornholio
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day. / During a sugar rush, Beavis' alter ego appears. He reeks havoc at Highland High looking for "teepee for his bunghole."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Murder Site / Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Beavis can't take Butt-head's verbal abuse anymore, and snaps while they're checking out the site of a local murder. / Beavis and Butt-head sue Kimberly for sexual harassment, since she's giving them wood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head come to the aid of a wounded baby bird...almost. / Beavis and Butt-head show up at an AA meeting hoping to score some booze.
programme.sub-title: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nektet service / Balleskvis
programme.desc: Beavis prøver yogabukser og får dem ikke av. / Guttene oppdager at de har rett til å nekte service til kunder på Burger World.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to stay awake all night, in an attempt to discover the secret behind morning wood. / For his oral report on an historical figure, Beavis recounts the valuable lessons he learned one night while eating at Burger World.
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History

programme.sub-title: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Figure Drawing / Date Bait
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get to look at real nudes. / The return of Lolita and Tanqueray! Beavis and Butt-head go on their first date, well, almost.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: To teite menn / Fredagsgalskap
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head oppfyller sin samfunnsplikt som jurymedlemmer./ Beavis og Butt-Head tror feilaktig at de har byttet kropp.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Car Wash / Kidnapped
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head attempt to make some money washing cars. / Beavis & Butt-head decide that kidnapping Stewart would be a quick way to some cash.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Politically Correct / True Crime
programme.desc: To better understand their female classmates, Beavis & Butt-head must get in touch with their feelings. Huh huh, he said "touch." / Beavis & Butt-head unknowingly star in their favorite crime reenactment shows.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Welcome to Valley Ranch
programme.desc: Når treningsleiren åpner med 43 kvinner, blir presset stort! Kellis entusiasme er smittsom, men det første møtet er også opprørende. Forventningene er skyhøye. Syv jenter må eliminieres for at troppen skal bestå av 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: A Week Of Firsts
programme.desc: Frykt griper treningsleirkandidatene når de innser at de må klare DCCs benspark og hoppspagat for første gang. Å lande så unaturlig krever stor tro på seg selv.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Getting The DCC Look
programme.desc: For å være en DCC må man se ut som en DCC. Denne uken skal Kelli sørge for at alle jentene har den rette looken. De begynner med en makeover og jentene drar til snobbete Halcyon Salon for å få nye frisyrer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Time To Get Serious
programme.desc: Kandidatene starter sin sjette uke og de må begynne å se ut som DCC, eller så kan de risikere å miste plassene sine. Melissa Rycroft og tidligere DCC Tina Kalina vikarierer for Judy og Kelli for å se kandidatene med nye øyne.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: A Lucid Dream
programme.desc: Det er tre jenter igjen å sende hjem og den første kampen er rett rundt hjørnet, så trykket er enormt når jentene vender tilbake til AT&T Stadium for å innta banen for første gang siden uttaket.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Payoff
programme.desc: Det er treningsleirens siste dag og alle er nervøse for at Kelli og Judy skal velge ut en tropp med færre enn 36 medlemmer. Etter noen tøffe beslutninger forvandles skrekk til glede når sluttroppen kunngjøres.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dare To Dream
programme.desc: Denne sesongen har 400 jenter våget å drømme stort at de kan bli en av de verdensberømte Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders. De satser alt når de preliminære uttakene for 2015-2016-troppen begynner.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dance Your Heart Out
programme.desc: Tjuetre veteraner melder seg på uttaket for å konkurrere mot 59 nybegynnere som vil ta plassene deres. Talent og utseende er ikke nok for å sikre en plass i troppen. Drømmer både går i oppfyllelse og knuses når kun 46 kommer seg til leiren.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: An Emotional Beginning
programme.desc: Treningsleiren begynner og Kelli sier hvor skapet skal stå. Noen av jentene bryter sammen når de innser hvor vanskelig det er å bli en DCC. Melissa Rycroft gir dem håp og råd om hvordan de skal klare seg.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Cuts Begin
programme.desc: Kelli og Judy må sende ti jenter hjem for å komme ned til troppens magiske 36. Tilpassingen av drakter viser Kelli hvem som har alt. Når de begynner å sende folk hjem, knuses drømmer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Becoming World Class
programme.desc: Jentene får DCC-looken, som er til hjelp for noen, men ikke andre. To gjester overrasker på treningen og rocker DCCs verden. Kelli opplever en av de pinligste kontorsbesøkene noensinne.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Having A Bad Day
programme.desc: Cameo- og showgruppe-uttak presser de nye og veteranene til bristepunktet. Melissa Rycroft forsøker å redde en DCC som henger i en tynn tråd, og et besøk på Kellis kontor avsluttes på en sjokkerende måte.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Cutting Board
programme.desc: Følelsene stormer når Kelli og Judy må ta vanskelige valg og sende folk hjem for å beholde troppens kvalitet. Melissa Rycroft deler ut uvurderlige råd.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Living the Dream
programme.desc: Kelli kunngjør endelig troppen. Skader truer starten på Cowboys treningsleir. Kaos på kampdagen kan ødelegge for jentene når opptredenen må være feilfri.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Squad announcement feels bittersweet as some favorites go home; the team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting; Game Day arrives.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Judge's Showcase
programme.desc: Lagets største og mest talentfulle klassen på treningsleiren må imponere DCC-dommerne med soloer og gruppedans for å få være med. Melissa Rycroft er også med.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: You Came To Play!
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft kommer til første øvelse for å lete etter artistmentorer. Så rusker Brittany Perry-Russell opp i kandidatene med koreografien sin.. Med Melissa Rycroft og Brittany Perry-Russell.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Call the Medic!
programme.desc: Kandidatene får lære teknikker så sparkene blir ennå høyere. Kelli blir urolig for en kandidat da Evan Miller underviser i hurtigkoreografi. Med Melissa Page og Evan Miller.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Et sosialt medie-dilemma
programme.desc: Denise DiCharry underviser i koreografi på høyt nivå for å se hvilke som lærer raskt. Kelli blir bedre kjent med de ferske kandidatene under uniformsprøvene. Kommer et upassende innlegg i sosiale medier til å føre til at en av jentene blir avstengt?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Stomp The Roach!
programme.desc: Judy lærer ut DCC-entreen og kandidatene må ta splitthopp for første gang, ikke alle like vellykkede. En øvelse for nybegynnere avslører de svakere kandidatene..

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 205
programme.desc: Etter meldinger om et rykende bål i Hafjell går drapsalarmen hos politiet på Lillehammer. På bålet viser det seg å ligge rester av et partert menneske. Samtidig meldes to personer savnet fra en bolig i nærheten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 305
programme.desc: 19. desember 1994 setter Bjørn Thore Langemyhr seg på et tog fra Tønsberg til Oslo. Det er det siste familien ser til ham. Samtidig begynner ryktene å gå om at et belastet rusmiljø kan ha tatt livet av Langemyhr.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 508
programme.desc: Etter en fest i juli 2017 forsvinner Tom Rune Hagen. Han har vært en del av et belastet rusmiljø, men akkurat denne uka har han planlagt en tur på fjellet for å fiske. Hva skjedde med Tom Rune?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 701
programme.desc: I september 2020 blir Erik Fasth funnet livløs i en blodpøl utenfor rommet til den funksjonshemmede kvinnen han er assistent for. Politiet begynner umiddelbart å undersøke hva som har skjedd.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 502
programme.desc: I 2016 går politiet til aksjon i en privatbolig på Romerike. På eierens datamaskin finner de harddisker fulle av bilder og videosnutter med seksuelle handlinger fra unge gutter ned i 9-årsalderen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 507
programme.desc: 13. desember 2008 skjer det som omtales som den verste brannen i Oslo siden krigen, i Urtegata på Grønland. Det ble fort mistenkt at brannen var påsatt.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 505
programme.desc: I 1999 brenner huset til Knut Øyvind Moe ned til grunnen i Valdres. To dager senere blir levningene hans hentet ut av brannruinene, og det viser seg at han ble skutt og drept i forkant av brannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 103
programme.desc: To turgåere finner et utbrent lik på et bål langs en øde skogsbilvei på Veståsen i Søndre Land. I flere uker står politiet helt uten svar på hvem som kan stå bak den groteske handlingen.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En tidlig februarmorgen i Stockholm melder en mann sin kone, Sacha, savnet. Etter hvert som politiet graver i parets fortid, oppdager de et turbulent forhold under den tilsynelatende ryddige overflaten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 204
programme.desc: På kvelden 1. nyttårsdag i 2012 utløses trygghetsalarmen hjemme hos 98 år gamle Hilda Feste. Da hjemmetjenesten rykker ut blir de vitne til en grufull hendelse. Politiet starter umiddelbart opp jakten på gjerningsmannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 403
programme.desc: Marit Ødegaard jobber på en veikro ikke langt fra svenskegrensen. En oktoberdag i 2000 dukker hun ikke opp på jobb. Kort tid etter blir Marit funnet drept i hjemmet sitt

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En ung mann blir funnet død på et jorde utenfor Enköping. Ved første øyekast ser det ut som om han har lagt seg ned for å hvile - men når politiet undersøker liket, oppdager de noe som antas å være et skuddsår.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 506
programme.desc: 26. januar 2001 ble Benjamin Hermansen knivstukket til døde som følge av sin hudfarge. Drapet fikk hele landet til å delta i antirasistiske markeringer og protester.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En familie som rammes av en husbrann klarer å unnslippe flammene, men alt de eier har blitt til aske. Det som først ser ut til å være en ulykke, viser seg å være mye mer komplisert.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 105
programme.desc: Tina Jørgensen forsvant etter en kveld på byen i Stavanger. En måned senere finner politiet liket av en 20 år gammel kvinne. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av Tina og deretter dumpet henne langs en øde veistrekning?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 301
programme.desc: Justisminister Tor Mikkel Wara blir i 2018 utsatt for en rekke alvorlige angrep på sitt private hjem. I flere måneder står politiet uten spor, helt til det kommer et sjokkerende gjennombrudd i saken.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 404
programme.desc: I desember 2015 gjør gallerist Reidar Osen et ærend med varebilen sin da han blir kapret av ukjente gjerningsmenn, som truer ham på livet og krever to millioner kroner. Hvem står bak kidnappingen?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 102
programme.desc: Åtte år gamle Monika Sviglinskaja blir funnet død i sitt hjem på Sotra. Politiet mener det dreier seg om et selvmord og henlegger saken. Men moren hennes er fortsatt overbevist om at noe kriminelt har skjedd.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En politietterforskning settes i gang etter at Maud Johansson meldes savnet den 18. oktober 2005. Etter flere år med iherdig leting ser det ut til at etterforskningen stopper opp, men politiet gir ikke opp.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 704
programme.desc: En sommernatt i Värmland bryter det ut slagsmål, hvoretter 21 år gamle Harout mottar et dødelig knivstikk. Politiet får mistanker om at et sjalusidrama kan være nøkkelen til å finne den skyldige.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: A Lack of Vision, Wound Up Rottie, Attack of the Peek-a-Poo
programme.desc: Cody, a blind Yorkshire terrier, is overly protective. Rottweiler Buffy has a dangerous obsession with the horses. Peek-a-Poo puppy Chloe, growls, snaps, and bites to get her way.
programme.sub-title: A Lack of Vision, Wound Up Rottie, Attack of the Peek-a-Poo

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Beagle Mania, Rescue Me… Rescue You
programme.desc: At six years old, beagle Gizmo has become very aggressive. Jennifer Lee Pryor runs Pryor’s Planet, a rescue organization to honor her late husband, comedian Richard Pryor.
programme.sub-title: Beagle Mania, Rescue Me… Rescue You

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Nightmare in Central Park, Bad Boy Baxter
programme.desc: Curly, an adopted lab-greyhound mix, is aggressive with other dogs. Rhodesian Ridgeback/Boxer mix Baxter is rescued after wandering the streets but has severe dog aggression.
programme.sub-title: Nightmare in Central Park, Bad Boy Baxter

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Lives Changed
programme.desc: In this special episode, Cesar revisits some of the incredible Dog Whisperer stories of the past four years and shares his reactions to the changes in the lives of these special packs.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Wicked Dog, The Gospel According to Cesar, Cry Baby
programme.desc: Wicked star Eden Espinosa’s Yorkshire Terrier, Owen, is creating drama. The Redemptorist brothers at Holy Redeemer College in Washington, D.C. needed a guard dog. Rocky, a rescue, can’t stop crying.
programme.sub-title: Wicked Dog, The Gospel According to Cesar, Cry Baby

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Made in Japan, Lawnmower Licker
programme.desc: Marley, a neglected Shiba Inu from Japan, develops aggression towards dogs and people. Piper, a Wire Fox Terrier obsessively tries to get to and lick the lawnmower engine.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Doubt of a Shadow
programme.desc: Newly adopted Shadow starts to exhibit aggressive tendencies towards his family. A professional dog walker needs help with several of her clients.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Anti-Social Sasha
programme.desc: Sasha, a pound pup, is perfect in the house, but outside she shows aggression towards other dogs. Angler, a Lab, is blind, and exhibits strange behavior around food.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bullying Bulldog
programme.desc: Bulldog Buster is prone to biting and growling. Sadie, a 3 month old Beagle/terrier mix, is frightened of trash cans. Lacey develops anxiety at 11 years of age.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buddy: Red Alert
programme.desc: Pit Bull Buddy, was found chained and starving to death and was very aggressive. Rufus, a Rottweiler/Shar Pei mix, has bitten five people. Both need to get their aggression under control.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: The Dark Side of Chipper
programme.desc: Chipper, a 2-month old Ridgeback/Boxer mix has become progressively more aggressive and has attacked 5 dogs. Two Whippets, Rudy and Monte, are causing issues at their owner’s place of business.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: A pet groomer gets rave reviews but needs Cesar's help with handling some difficult clients. A Chihuahua makes a lot of noise, causing chaos with her cohabiters. Can Cesar install calm in the pack?

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Not So Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: A Border Collie is overly protective of her owner, nipping at anyone who comes near her. A Police Officer rescued a German shepherd, who is people and dog aggressive and always ready for a fight.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Jake in Exile
programme.desc: An Australian Shepherd/Pit Bull Mix has severe aggression problems towards women. A Boxer is an expert escape artist, able to jump the 6 foot backyard fence. Her owners are concerned for her safety.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: The Language of Scrout
programme.desc: A Doberman Mix has taken control of his family home; an animal communicator calls for back-up with her Doberman Pinscher; and a comedienne enlists Cesar's help for her two temperamental rescue dogs.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Fear of Dogs
programme.desc: After being attacked by a dog as a boy, a man must learn to overcome his fear of dogs for the sake of his career and his wife and children. Cesar is called in to exorcise Ernesto’s fear.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Lotus Blossoms
programme.desc: A jealous dachshund learns to get along with both of his owners. Can Cesar exorcize a demon possessed German Shepherd that prevents his people from entering certain rooms of the house.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: The Red Zone
programme.desc: Two new sibling dogs fight over everything, from food to toys. Facing the possibility of giving up one of the pooches, Cesar travels south to end the civil war between the two dueling pit bulls.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Outsiders"
programme.desc: When intruders penetrates their tunnel world, father decides to welcome them with gifts, but instead of gratitude, they are met with greed and violence. Things escalate to the point that tunnel dwellers have no other choice but to leave.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Orphans
programme.desc: After her father dies, Catherine thinks about living the rest of her life in the world below.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Arabesque
programme.desc: Vincent's childhood sweetheart returns to the tunnels, and Vincent reveals a painful memory of her to Catherine.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: When the Blue Bird Sings
programme.desc: Catherine meets a persistent artist, who follows and spies on her. But this artist isn't all what he seems to be.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Watcher
programme.desc: On Vincent and Catherine's two year anniversary, Catherine receives a phone message indicating that someone is watching them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Distant Shore
programme.desc: Catherine heads out to L.A California, to find a witness for an investigation.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Trial
programme.desc: Catherine is put in charge of a murder case in court, and to bring justice to a five year old murdered son.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Kingdom by the Sea
programme.desc: Catherine is blocked out of an investigation involving a murder attempt by the C.I.A. But there are more shocks yet to come, and a familiar face returns.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Hollow Men
programme.desc: Vincent witnesses their latest murder and is unable to stop them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: What Rough Beast
programme.desc: Catherine is attacked in the park by two men disguised as policemen.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ceremony of Innocence
programme.desc: Following the death of investigative reporter, Bernie Spirko, Elliot Burch and Catherine set out to find the man who hired and killed Spirko.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Rest Is Silence…
programme.desc: Following the ordeal with Paracelcus, Vincent moves forward toward a stress-aggravated mental collapse. Vincent continues to come to terms with the beast in himself and finds himself losing control of his thoughts.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Nevermore
programme.desc: Vincent has begun his quest to find his son and makes his first move by revealing himself to Elliot.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Snow
programme.desc: The man who killed Catherine and took her baby sends an assassin to get Vincent. He manages to find the underground world and goes looking for him.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Beggar's Comet
programme.desc: Not wanting to put the Tunnel World in further danger, Vincent decides to leave the tunnels and with the death of Snow, Gabriel plots for Vincent's demise.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Time to Heal
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the boat explosion that most likely killed Elliot, Diana is shocked when she encounters a wounded Vincent who collapses on Catherine's grave.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Chimes at Midnight
programme.desc: After Vincent entrusts Snow's ring to Diana, she quickly discovers Gabriel's henchman have targeted her and soon kidnap her and take her to Gabriel.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Invictus
programme.desc: With Vincent caged, Gabriel allows him to see his infant son who suddenly begins to make a miraculous recovery.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Who of You
programme.desc: Struggling actor Harry (Ethan Embry) risks everything to catch his big break, but an impulsive scheme takes a few turns no one saw coming. Daniel Sunjata and Billy Porter also guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Ovation
programme.desc: The music career of struggling singer Jasmine takes off overnight after she witnesses a tragic incident. Jasmine begins receiving rapturous applause everywhere she goes, but she soon realizes the relentless recognition comes at a steep cost.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Short Drink from a Certain Fountain
programme.desc: Trying to keep up with his younger wife, Harmon convinces his brother to inject him with an experimental youth serum.
programme.sub-title: A Short Drink from a Certain Fountain

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Ninety Years Without Slumbering
programme.desc: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Ring-A-Ding Girl
programme.desc: Bunny receives a ring from her fan club in her home town. In the ring she sees the faces of people from her hometown telling her she's needed there so she returns home.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: You Drive
programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Among The Untrodden
programme.desc: Transfer student Irene's (Sophia Macy) unusual interests make her an easy target at her new all-girls boarding school until she discovers that popular classmate Madison (Abbie Hern) possesses a unique talent.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: 8.0
programme.desc: At the outer reaches of the world, a team of scientists discover a new highly intelligent species, but its existence may endanger more than their research. Joel McHale, Nadia Hilker, Michelle Ang, Tim Armstrong, and Brandon Jay McLaren guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Long Morrow
programme.desc: Before leaving on his mission, an astronaut meets a woman. They fall in love...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Self-Improvement of Salvadore Ross
programme.desc: A man finds that he can trade anything he has, including youth and personality, with anybody else.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Number Twelve Looks Just Like You
programme.desc: In a future where everyone must undergo an operation at the age of 19 to make them identical to everyone else, one woman desperately tries to hang onto her own identity.
programme.sub-title: Number Twelve Looks Just Like You

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Black Leather Jackets
programme.desc: Three tough-looking men on motorcycles disrupt a peaceful suburb when they move in. Yet the neighbors could never imagine just how dangerous these men really are.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Human Face
programme.desc: A grieving couple's (Chris Meloni and Jenna Elfman) move is interrupted by an otherworldly encounter, leading them to second guess what's worth leaving behind. Tavi Gevinson also guest stars.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Small Town
programme.desc: A quiet church handyman (Damon Wayans Jr.) uncovers a magical scale model imbuing him with the power to help his struggling small town. But with the sleazy Mayor Conway (David Krumholtz) taking all the credit, will Jason's good intentions be corrupted?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Night Call
programme.desc: Mysterious phone calls haunt a disabled woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: From Agnes - With Love
programme.desc: A computer technician must deal with the queen of all femme fatales: a computer named Agnes who wreaks havoc on his love life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Spur of the Moment
programme.desc: After being chased on horseback by a terrifying, unidentified figure in black, Anne Henderson faces the biggest decision of her life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: An Occurrence at Owl Creek Bridge
programme.desc: A Confederate spy is spared death when the rope meant to hang him miraculously breaks. Or does it?
programme.sub-title: An Occurrence at Owl Creek Bridge

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Try, Try
programme.desc: When the quick-witted Claudia (Kylie Bunbury) has a chance run-in with Mark (Topher Grace) at a museum, he dazzles her with his seemingly miraculous abilities. But after the true source of his charisma is revealed, the encounter takes a dark turn.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: You Might Also Like
programme.desc: Stay-at-home housewife Mrs. Warren (Gretchen Mol) looks forward to acquiring the widely marketed 'Egg,' an enigmatic device that promises to make everything better for everyone forever.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Queen of the Nile
programme.desc: Columnist Jordan Herrick is startled to learn that a famous movie actress hasn't aged in years. Intrigued, he investigates... and soon learns a terrifying secret.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: What's in the Box
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Masks
programme.desc: A dying man demands his family wear masks that he's given them at a Mardi Gras party.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Am the Night - Color Me Black
programme.desc: On the day an unpopular idealist is to be executed for the killing of a racist bully, the townsfolk are shocked to see the skies have turned pitch black.
programme.sub-title: I Am the Night - Color Me Black

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Sounds and Silences
programme.desc: A man's wish to listen to loud noise backfires.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Caesar and Me
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Jeopardy Room
programme.desc: Major Ivan Kuchenko is trapped inside a hotel room with Commissar Vassiloff, a hitman, and Boris, his assistant, in the room across the street. Vassiloff has planted a bomb in the room and Ivan must find it within three hours or be blown to bits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Stopover in a Quiet Town (aka Strangers in Town)
programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.
programme.sub-title: Stopover in a Quiet Town (aka Strangers in Town)

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Encounter
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: What’s News?
programme.desc: Josh lands a job as a photojournalist for the Boston Citizen, and is surprised to learn that Sabrina is a fan of his new boss, Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Murder on the Halloween Express
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda are invited to attend a murder mystery party on the Halloween Mystery Train, which makes a stop in Boston.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Gift of Gab
programme.desc: Sabrina and Roxie are thrilled to get their own show on the campus radio station, a two hour talk show they call "Chick Chat."

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Thin Ice
programme.desc: Sabrina finds herself in a jam when ex-boyfriend Harvey requests that she use her magical powers to help him.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Hex, Lies, and No Videotape
programme.desc: Josh gets Sabrina an internship at the Boston Citizen where he works.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Humble Pie
programme.desc: Sabrina and her roommates discover that Morgan didn't pay her portion of the rent when the housing office sends a student to replace her in the house.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Birthday Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina receives an unexpected surprise on her birthday, a visit from her evil Aunt Irms, the matriarch of the Spellman family.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Deliver Us from Email
programme.desc: Intern Sabrina wants to propose writing her own column about the college experience to Boston Citizen editor Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Cloud Ten
programme.desc: In an attempt to escape her problems, Sabrina decides to visit her childhood friend, Cathy Winter (Colleen Ann Fitzpatrick) in the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina and the Candidate
programme.desc: Sabrina is assigned to research the local city councilman election for an article, which will run in the Boston Citizen.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: I Think I Love You
programme.desc: Sabrina's relationship with Josh couldn't be going better until Josh tells her that he loves her.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Arrangement
programme.desc: Sabrina's devilish Aunt Irma returns for yet another unexpected visit.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Time After Time
programme.desc: When Zelda's boyfriend breaks up with her she cooks up a storm to drown her sorrows.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina and the Kiss
programme.desc: Sabrina gets an unexpected surprise when ex-boyfriend Derek stops by to say hello.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Competition
programme.desc: A friendly game of tennis turns into a battle of the sexes when Josh tells Sabrina that women are not as competitive as men.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: I, Busybody
programme.desc: Always willing to help others with their problems, whether they ask for it or not, Sabrina finds herself in a heap of trouble when her advice goes awry.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Guilty
programme.desc: When Sabrina uses a little magic to get Zelda nominated for an award, she has no idea what she's started.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Whole Ball of Wax
programme.desc: When Sabrina gets an eerie feeling that she is being followed, she decides to take matters into her own hands but ends up face-to-face with her mother Diana.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Driving Mr. Goodman
programme.desc: Sabrina persuades Miles Goodman to get his driver's license and finds herself in the middle of a nasty lawsuit.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: I Fall to Pieces
programme.desc: When Hilda's boyfriend breaks up with her, she is devastated and claims that she is through with men.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Total Sabrina Live
programme.desc: Sabrina’s search for a job takes her to NYC and the Mtelevision studios.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Big Head
programme.desc: Sabrina has to write about an obnoxious pop star, who threatens to sue the magazine unless she apologises! Plus, Roxie and Morgan try to train Salem.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Call Me Crazy
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to impress her colleagues but accidentally says far too much about her magical life, making everyone think that she's totally crazy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Shift Happens
programme.desc: Sabrina is worried about having to interview a hip-hop star, but a spell to make them nicer backfires, and causes the pair to switch personalities.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Free Sabrina
programme.desc: Reporter Sabrina follows a story and almost lands herself in jail.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Unplugged
programme.desc: Sabrina encounters animated Shaggy and Scooby Doo inside Leonard's computer while trying to destroy proof of her powers.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Witch Way Out
programme.desc: Sabrina meets a gallery owner (guest star Austin Peck) who already possesses a leprechaun (guest star Verne Troyer) and wants a witch to round out his collection.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Bada-Ping
programme.desc: Sabrina believes a musician (guest star Richard Voll) is being blackmailed by a gangster (guest star Garry Marshall); Avril Lavigne (guest starring as herself) performs. Emily Hart also guest stars.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: It's a Hot, Hot, Hot, Hot Christmas
programme.desc: The girls spend Christmas in Miami where Roxie runs into her ex-con mom.
programme.sub-title: It's a Hot, Hot, Hot, Hot Christmas

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Wild Wild Witch
programme.desc: The West gets even wilder when Sabrina takes the reins as town sheriff.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: She’s Baaack!
programme.desc: Cousin Amanda returns to give Sabrina a little competition in the teenage witch -and love-- department.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Four Faces Of Sabrina
programme.desc: Choosing a college literally tears Sabrina apart when she tries too hard to make everyone happy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)
programme.desc: After four years of enduring Sabrina’s spells and strange behavior, Harvey finally suspects she is a witch
programme.sub-title: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Every Witch Way but Loose
programme.desc: After spending the summer trying to get over her first love, Sabrina decides to make some changes in her life, including attending college and living away from home like a normal freshman.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Double Time
programme.desc: In order to keep up with the overwhelming academic and social demands of college life, Sabrina puts herself under a complicated time spell to move at lightning speed, but she later discovers that the extra time got sucked away from her roommates.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Heart of the Matter
programme.desc: When Sabrina realizes she has been turning down guys right and left since her break up with Harvey, she casts a spell to turn herself into a dating machine.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: You Can’t Twin
programme.desc: On a visit to the Other Realm, Sabrina meets up with her evil twin Katrina who steals her passport and returns to mortal life posing as Sabrina.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: House of PI’s
programme.desc: Sabrina and Roxie are unexpectedly paired together to write a story in an effort to land a coveted spot on the school newspaper.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Halloween Scene
programme.desc: When Sabrina can’t find anyone to share her enthusiasm for Halloween she decides to throw her own haunted holiday bash and it turns into the party of the year.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Welcome Traveler
programme.desc: When Sabrina tries to pull Miles away from his latest conspiracy theory and into some semblance of a social life, she unknowingly pushes him right into the hands of a cult whose eccentric leader claims to be a witch.
