programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After Annie (Amy Pietz) loses her boyfriend, her job and her agent, she impulsively accepts a date with her local drycleaner, Gil (guest star Ken Campbell),and spends an evening to remember.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Richard (Malcolm Gets) decide to go out on their first official "date" together on Halloween, but their romantic evening turns into fright night when Richard gets himself into a rooftop jam.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline stumbles across Richard's (Malcolm Gets) divorce papers in his desk drawer, but an office mishap sends her on a frantic paper chase to retrieve the documents after they are lost in the interoffice mail.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Tired of losing acting roles to other, more well-endowed women, Annie (Amy Pietz) surprises the gang on Thanksgiving Day by announcing that she plans to get breast implants.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard gets an offer that his empty bank account can't refuse: his Aunt Frieda promises to give him $5,000 as a Bar Mitzvah gift if he agrees to finally go through the ceremony.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard (Malcolm Gets) agrees to let Reg become a houseguest after the cartoonist has a fight with his girlfriend, Wanda.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Big Bad Bed

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Del (Eric Lutes) experience mixed results when they become office mentors to a young cartoonist with an overactive libido and an eager marketing student.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to take Charlie (guest star Andy Lauer) under her wing and teach him the fundamentals of life after Del (Eric Lutes) is forced to fire the hapless in-line skater from his job at the greeting card company.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to right an old wrong by giving up a romantic weekend in Boston with Richard (Malcolm Gets) to help out a visiting childhood chum, Joanie (guest star Kelly Coffield), whom Caroline once bullied in school.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And Joanie And The Stick

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and the gang visit Caroline's family home in Pestigo, Wisconsin, but the homecoming is ruined when her parents tell Caroline that they are selling the house.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) gives Richard(Malcolm Gets) a 7 p.m. deadline to make a marital commitment to her, then is coerced into spending the day making pottery with Del (Eric Lutes) and Annie (Amy Pietz) while she anxiously awaits his decision.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After deciding they can't wait to get married, Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Richard (Malcolm Gets) plan their nuptials for the following week.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: As Caroline and Richard (Malcolm Gets) prepare to leave for Italy to visit his newborn son, Richard makes a confession that gives Caroline second thoughts about their future together.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline Duffy (Lea Thompson) has her professional life just theway she wants it. "Caroline in the City," the comic strip she created, turned intomerchandising gold with an array of greeting cards, books and calendars.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline and Del are moments away from departing for a weekend trip to Atlantic City when Richard bursts into the apartment with news that he has been mugged.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline and Annie scheme to get Richard's paintings displayed in a prestigious gallery, and he's thrilled when their efforts earn him the recognition of gallery owner Kenneth Arabian.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Gay Art Show

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Del(Eric Lutes) get carried away competing on the racquetball court, Caroline injures her back and ends up confined to bed.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline gets stiffed at her ATM, she meets with bank personnel to retrieve her money. However, because the surveillance camera captured her in an awkward moment, she's too embarrassed to let the bank manager view the tape of her transaction.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Del agree to go to dinner with Annie and Warren, her new boyfriend, they find that Annie left out one minor detail about his background --Warren's an ex-convict with a burglary record.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline finds out the Christmas gift Del gave her might have been extremely expensive, she ponders the message he may be trying to send her about their relationship.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard sets Caroline up on a date with an art council member who happens to hold the key to Richard's future as a successful artist, but when he finds out the man is married Richard wrestles with protecting a friend or furthering his career.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Richard bicker over their shared work space, Caroline finds the perfect solution when she purchases an antique partner's desk from the desk's original owners, writing and life partners Vic Stansky and Stella Dawson.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Annie re-introduces Caroline to the wonderful world of dating, by taking her on a man-hunt, but when Caroline thinks she has met the perfect man, she later finds that he's no love connection.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Del surprises Caroline (Lea Thompson) with a marriage proposal, Richard (Malcolm Gets) feels he no longer fits into Caroline's life and decides it's time to look for another job.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Del (Eric Lutes) takes Caroline (Lea Thompson) on a spontaneous weekend trip, they unexpectedly run into Del’s bitter ex-wife Jill (guest star Joely Fisher) and her boyfriend Blair (guest star Kenny Johnson).

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Annie discover that a John Landis movie is shooting in their neighborhood, they jump at the chance to become extras, but Annie’s excitement turns to sheer bliss when she learns that her dream man is starring in the film.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) helps Richard (Malcolm Gets) confront unresolved issues with his jet-setting mother, Natalie (Elizabeth Ashley, “Evening Shade”), when she makes a surprise visit to New York.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) entrusts Annie(Amy Pietz) with various maid-of-honor duties, she learns that Annie’s strong suits aren’t dependability and punctuality and their frien2dship strains under the stress of preparing for Caroline’s wedding.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline is confused by nervous pangs and Del experiences panic attacks. Meanwhile, Richard decides to confess his love to Caroline as a last-ditch effort to stop her from marrying Del.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline decides that if she and Del resume dating they should abstain from lovemaking for a fortnight and instead focus on what’s at the core of their relationship.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline is thrilled when romantic sparks fly between her and the emergency room veterinarian who treats Salty for a minor injury.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline finally discovers that Richard is back in New York, she offers him his old position back and Richard must decide if he wants to be in Caroline's life again.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie finds herself being audited by IRS agent Jimmy Callahan she misconstrues his friendly manner for amorous interest.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline's young boyfriend Joe declares his undying love for her, she realizes that she is not ready for the level of commitment that Joe arrived at so quickly.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Guy Who Gets There Too Soon

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard's dream of being a paid artist comes true when he is commissioned to paint a mural for New York City.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When gentile Del falls for Risa Glickman, who only dates Jewish men, he takes drastic measures to pretend that he is Jewish.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Nice Jewish Boy

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Cabbie Jim Ignatowski's legendary psychic powers hilariously thrust him into the hectic world of television programming when he predicts that a TV show will be a hit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie the dispatcher is gleeful, but Alex is aghast when the romantic affair between Alex and the new waitress at Mario's is complicated by another suitor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Louie's mother announces her plans to remarry, the panicked dispatcher threatens to sever all ties with her unless she cancels the marriage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine blows a bundle on the Big Apple's hottest hair stylist for the social bash of the year.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Tony begins working with a new cabbie, Lucius, a former football player. Lucius inspires Tony to try to get his boxing license reinstated.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Ring the bells! Spread the word! Latka Gravas and Simka Dahblitz are getting married, and the dingy Sunshine Cab Co. garage is transformed into a chapel of beauty for the social event of the cabbies' season.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The unflappable Jim gets an unexpected jolt when a wrecking ball crashes through the wall of his condemned apartment. A disaster ensues when he is forced to move in with Louie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The drivers bare their souls, recalling those moments in their lives when fate caused them to detour from the street of dreams down the alley to becoming a cabbie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: As Elaine nears a decision on her future, the cabbies reminisce about those glorious things that "might have been" had fate not sent them down that treacherous road to the Sunshine Cab Co.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Reverend Jim comes to the rescue when Alex is consumed by gambling fever after a lucky night in Atlantic City.

programme.title: PGA Tour Originals
programme.desc: Ben Griffin's 2025 PGA TOUR season changed his life. Learn how in this documentary.

programme.title: PGA Tour Originals
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes at the 3rd Signature Event of the season.

programme.title: PGA TOUR Rewind
programme.desc: Relive the 2016 Charles Schwab Challenge as Jordan Spieth dominated at Colonial in his home state.

programme.title: PGA TOUR -- The Drop
programme.desc: Diving into the intensity of tournament play, previewing what's ahead and recapping storylines; giving fans a unique look at the players on and off the course.

programme.title: The Starter
programme.desc: Catch up on all the latest happenings on the PGA TOUR with feature content on the best players in the world.

programme.title: Wyndham Clark Wins THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson 2026
programme.desc: Wyndham Clark shoots a final round 60 to win THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson at TPC Craig Ranch in McKinney, Texas.

programme.title: 2024 Charles Schwab Challenge
programme.desc: Davis Riley wins the 2024 Charles Schwab Challenge to get his first solo win on the PGA TOUR. Riley's last win was at the 2023 Zurich Classic with teammate Nick Hardy. Riley shot rounds of 66-64-66-70 to finish 14-under par.

programme.title: 2020 Charles Schwab Challenge - Final Round
programme.desc: Daniel Berger outlasts Collin Morikawa in a one-hole playoff at the 2020 Charles Schwab Challenge.

programme.title: The Starter
programme.desc: Catch up on all the latest happenings on the PGA TOUR with feature content on the best players in the world.

programme.title: PGA TOUR Backspin
programme.desc: Watch the latest highlights from the best players in the world from courses around the PGA TOUR.

programme.title: The Starter
programme.desc: Catch up on all the latest happenings on the PGA TOUR with feature content on the best players in the world.

programme.title: Davis Riley Wins Charles Schwab Challenge
programme.desc: Davis Riley wins the 2024 Charles Schwab Challenge to get his first solo win on the PGA TOUR. Riley's last win was at the 2023 Zurich Classic with teammate Nick Hardy. Riley shot rounds of 66-64-66-70 to finish 14-under par.

programme.title: Rory McIlroy and Shane Lowry Win Zurich Classic
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy and Shane Lowry win the 2024 Zurich Classic of New Orleans after outlasting Chad Ramey and Martin Trainer on the first playoff hole. They finished 25-under in their team debut with rounds of 61-70-64-68 at TPC Louisiana.

programme.title: 2013 Zurich Classic of New Orleans
programme.desc: The 2013 Zurich Classic of New Orleans, where Billy Horschel just edged out D.A. Points by one stroke to earn the first of his two career wins at the event.

programme.title: Matt McCarty Wins the Black Desert Championship
programme.desc: PGA TOUR Rookie Matt McCarty wins the inaugural 2024 Black Desert Championship. McCarty was competing in just his second PGA TOUR event after receiving a promotion for winning three times on the Korn Ferry Tour this season.

programme.title: PGA TOUR Rewind
programme.desc: Relive the 2016 Charles Schwab Challenge as Jordan Spieth dominated at Colonial in his home state.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Surprise! It's a Snooki
programme.desc: Mike tar etterforskningen til et nytt nivå og krever 'full avsløring'. En livlig diskusjon oppstår på do. Og Snooki drar til Poconos for å overraske Jwoww på fødselsdagen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The SS Side Piece
programme.desc: En Snooki har forsvunnet, et par Guido-er skal ned i kartongbåter, og Angelina skal holde en tale. Jwowws fødselsdag tar helt av.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Worst Talent Show Ever
programme.desc: Jwowws fødselsdag er på grensen til å spore av når Snookis alter ego, Dren, svarer. Vinny leder det første, og muligens også det siste , årlige Jersey Shore Pocono talentshowet. Spenningen bobler mellom Dren og Angelina.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Best Birthday Ever
programme.desc: En krangel mellom samboerne overskygges kun av et uforglemmelig talentshow ledet av Vinny Guadagnino. Snookis opptreden er av en annen verden og Angelinas tale gir uttrykket 'bombing' en ny betydning.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Turen er over og Snooki må rydde opp rotet etter Dren. Samtidig planlegger Mike nok en genusavsløring, selv om alle vet at det blir en gutt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Meatball Day Wrap-Up Special
programme.desc: Etter en virvelvindsesong i Pocono-fjellene, samles Jersey Shore-damene til en kjøttbolledag. Der hyller de hele fjerde sesong med en drink eller to...eller ti.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Hurricane Situation
programme.desc: Medboerne kommer hjem fra Italia, og gleder seg over å være tilbake. Men et drama er i emning idet Mike truer med å ødelegge Snookis forhold til Jionni.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Snooki vs. The Rock
programme.desc: Deena er ikke gravid lenger og har en kjøttkakedag med Snooki. Samtidig. Vinny bor ikke på to kyster lenger, Angelina er lei og Mike venter på å kunne ta med lille Romeo hjem..

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Hollywood Shore
programme.desc: Vinny innser at hjemme alltid er best. Mike bytter Prosciutto med placenta. Og et rykte skaper brudulje under jentenes store tur til Vestkysten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Meatballs Don't Hike
programme.desc: Jentenes Hollywood-tur får en omvei når de får høre at Vinny har solgt huset sitt. Men før alle drar gir Vinny dem en L-A-opplevelse de alltid kommer til å huske, men kanskje vil glemme på grunn av all krangel mellom Angelina og Vinny.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Two Baptisms and a Pet Psychic
programme.desc: Pauly D skal til Jersey under uken og alle skal få treffe lille Romeo. Samtidig trenger Angelina klarhet om ekteskapet, og tar hjelp av et dyremedium. Situation gjør seg klar for en 'Blessification'.
programme.sub-title: Two Baptisms and a Pet Psychic

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Blessification
programme.desc: Mike føler seg gjenfødt etter å ha blitt 'blessified'. Angelina føler seg fortapt etter en seanse med et dyremedium. Og gjengen gjør seg klar for neste familieferie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Not-So-International Vacation
programme.desc: Gjengen legger ut på en familieferie, hvor Mike får en geografitime, Jenni får en stor overraskelse og en uventet konflikt dukker opp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Deenas hevn.
programme.desc: Pauly D får lære å spille bingo, Angelina går under uten bagasjen sin, Mike etterforsker og en alarmerende oppdagelse ryster gjengen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Gratulerer med dagen, Vinny!
programme.desc: Tingene tar av når gjengen forstår at de har blitt lurt av Deena. Snooki ankommer i tide for en flytende tiki-bar, Mikes frihetsfest.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Best Party Planner Ever
programme.desc: En tropestorm herjer, Snooki og Angelina gjenskaper sin berømte krangel, og gjengen fester om bord på en båt som også er en herregård. Og nevnte vi sexterapeuten?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The S**pert
programme.desc: Florida Keys blir følsom når en sexterapeut graver dypt ned i Angelina og Chris' forhold. Så blir det rotete når kjøttbollene skaper et improvisert talkshow. Og enda mer rot når Mike finner en beskjed fra Pauly D.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Lie Detector Test
programme.desc: Bli med Mike, Snooki, Pauly og Deena når de diskuterer å dra tilbake til Seaside Heights og Vinnys hjemlengsel. Da gjengen gjennomgår dramatikken mellom Mike og Snooki, tar tingene skikkelig av.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Livin' La Vida Loca
programme.desc: Mike får lære at blondiner har mer moro. Pauly overtar Madison Square Garden. Gruppechatten tar av når bilder viser Angelina i Mexico med en mann som ikke er ektemannen hennes.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Spill the Tea
programme.desc: Angelina forteller sin versjon, Jenni og Nicole bestikker Deena til å fortelle sladderen og Pauly planlegger en god, gammeldags OG-ferie. Samtidig må Mike and Lauren fatte en vanskelig avgjørelse om Mosey.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Old Mike vs. New Mike
programme.desc: Veien til El Paso tar en uventet vending når Mike blir møtt med et antall rykter og beskyldninger. Det blir et rent helvete da han formidler dem til gjengen.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Says Who?
programme.desc: Simon’s experiment with mind control backfires when Matt turns the tables and convinces him that he’s shrinking.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do
programme.desc: The Camden house feels like Heartbreak Hotel when Wilson and Mary split up and Matt gets a “Dear John” letter from Heather.
programme.sub-title: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Girls Just Want to Have Fun
programme.desc: Lucy innocently courts trouble by prancing around the mall in a short skirt and high heels while Eric helps a not-so-innocent girl in a gang.
programme.sub-title: Girls Just Want to Have Fun

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Do Something
programme.desc: Mom’s muffins are so delicious she decides to go into business…and quickly burns out.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: I Hate You
programme.desc: The girls learn that words can really hurt people, and Simon befriends a Holocaust survivor.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: Mary loses her cool when she finds out her brother paid his friend to go out with her.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Lead, Follow or Get Out of the Way
programme.desc: Mary wants to quit the basketball team when a new girl outperforms her.
programme.sub-title: Lead, Follow or Get Out of the Way

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Rush to Judgment
programme.desc: Mary’s hurt and confused when her coach’s interest in her moves beyond the basketball court.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Stuck in the Middle with You
programme.desc: Two boys are fighting for Lucy’s affections, while Annie and Eric are fighting in a marriage-counseling group.
programme.sub-title: Stuck in the Middle with You

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Red Tape
programme.desc: A mysterious personal ad in the school paper gets Matt more calls than he can handle.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Homecoming
programme.desc: The only thing keeping Mary from getting back on the court after her knee surgery is fear.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Simon attends his first make-out party and learns more about girls than how they kiss.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Nothing Endures But Change
programme.desc: Lucy’s friend is killed in a tragic car accident, and Lucy feels that she’s to blame.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: My Kinda Guy
programme.desc: When the Camdens host a French foreign exchange student, everyone seems to be getting into trouble!

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Time to Leave the Nest
programme.desc: Matt’s bending the rules and hinting about moving out...against Annie’s wishes.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Like a Harlot
programme.desc: Mary and Lucy set themselves up for disastrous dates and Eric unwittingly fixes his son up with the “Senior Slut.”

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Boyfriends… (Part 1)
programme.desc: Mom and Dad are concerned about Mary’s involvement with her boyfriend…especially when they get some shocking test results back!

programme.title: 7th Heaven: ...And Girlfriends (Part 2)
programme.desc: In the second season finale, Matt graduates high school and get ready to move out, and Annie and Eric fear that Mary is pregnant.

programme.title: Shaolin Wooden Men
programme.desc: Etter å ha vært vitne til drapet på sin far, trener «Little Mute» i Shaolin-tempelet for å ta hevn, der han blir undervist av ulike lærere. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China NO
programme.desc: Wong Fei-hung er leder for en kampsportskole på slutten av 1800-tallet som blir tvunget til å handle når skolen blir angrepet av vestlige slavehandlere.

programme.title: Knockabout
programme.desc: De to brødre og småforbrydere Yipao og Taipao overtaler en kampsportsekspert til at tage dem som elever, helt uvidende om hans beskidte fortid. Denne film vises uden undertekster.

programme.title: Return of the Street Fighter
programme.desc: Karatemester Tsurugi blir innblandet i et komplott fra den amerikanske mafiaen om å ta over karate-dojoene i Asia, godt hjulpet av en korrupt dojomester. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III
programme.desc: Det hele begynner med en at en magisk spire transporterer deres gode venn April gjennom tid og rom, helt til samuraienes Japan. Leonardo og gjengen drar med en gang etter henne, og må nå beseire den onde Lord Naringa for å redde April.

programme.title: Shaolin Wooden Men
programme.desc: Etter å ha vært vitne til drapet på sin far, trener «Little Mute» i Shaolin-tempelet for å ta hevn, der han blir undervist av ulike lærere. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Dragon Lord
programme.desc: Jakten på kjærligheten og rampestrekene til Dragon og barndomsvennen Buller blir avbrytt når de hører at en gjeng begynner å smugle kinesiske nasjonal skatter utenlands. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Donatello, Rafael, Michelangelo og Leonardo er muterte, grønne ninja-skilpadder som elsker pizza og lever under New Yorks gateplan. Derifra tar de opp kampen mot den ondskapsfulle forbryteren Shredder og hans armé av svartkledde krigere.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John has anxiety issues over dating a younger woman and Reggie is getting threats from an ex-convict. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Christmas turns Reggie into a competitive freak; Bob, a greedy super; Jake, a non-participant and John an Angry Head.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John inherits an urn with one of his old patients, Harry in it.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has a run-in at the office with an elder hostile Jake's grandmother.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie makes John a test subject in her psychology experiment and Jake gets his driver's license renewed. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John Becker goes on a cruise and Jake dates a supermodel. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is asked to be the keynote speaker at an early graduation for Harding High schools class of 2001.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: After her marriage ends, Megan re-enters Becker's life and he becomes aware of Megan's sordid past. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Linda and Reggie date the same man and Becker unwillingly gets involved. Bob finds out he has a tenant whos a prostitute. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John Becker has insomnia and the gang tries to help him get through it. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John runs into an old college mentor/professor who doesn't remember him. This torments John who tries to get the professor to remember him. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets an unexpected visit from his godson who is reluctant to tell his father he's gay. Reggie gets into a caddy argument with her friend, Sara. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: You Say Gay Son, I Say Godson

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John thinks the new water deliveryman is bad luck. A string of mishaps occur and everyone blames it on the deliveryman. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is being sued for malpractice by a patient. Louis knits Margaret a swest (sweater/vest) and Reggie, Bob and Jake discuss the worst ways to die. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Beckers patient sues him for malpractice and Bob sleeps with his Johns lawyer, Ruth. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker sees a psychologist and Linda looks for a new job.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: During an attempt to quit smoking, John attends a for-kids only pancake breakfast.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Jake gets married to a girl he just met. John buys a faux designer clock as a gift, which gets broken.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John helps a homeless man he discovered is a con artist when he learns the man is ill.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John panics when he has to get an MRI, finally resorting to Valium to get through the claustrophobic test.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John takes Reggies advice to be more sensitive with women. It helps at the office with Margaret, but backfires with a woman he is dating.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is surprised when a patient is disappointed at the news that he's not terminally ill. Jake scams Bob in a Scrabble game.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie goes out to dinner with her abusive friend Sara and Sara's husband, Richard. She finds that she and Richard are attracted to each other.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John tries to keep a casual love affair alive, while Bob tries to turn a found Super Bowl ring into his ticket to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John believes that Christmas is a phony time of the year. Instead of embracing the Christmas spirit, he uses getting robbed as vindication for his position.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and the crew decide to barter services office visits for food and services.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets in hot water with parents when his nutrition lecture at an elementary school turns into a sex talk.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Bob uses a questionable friend to get Reggie a great deal on a new freezer. John acts as a sex therapist for the Bennetts, an 80-year-old couple having difficulties because of Mr. Bennett's newly revived libido.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: An unflattering picture of someone other than John is placed in an article about him, causing him distress.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: When John receives some expensive steaks from a patient, his new neighbor Chris cajoles him into throwing a party.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie and Chris compete for John's affection. Linda takes Margaret out for a night on the town.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: Allies turn the tide in the Atlantic, where initially German U-Boats harass freely convoys to supply Britain. The route to bring American soldiers who will land on D-Day is clear.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Hitler's Inside Man
programme.desc: Chaim Rumkowski, leader of the Lodz ghetto during WWII, believed cooperation with the Nazis could save lives, providing labor in exchange for food. This approach kept some semblance of community and culture alive amidst unimaginable horror.

programme.title: Secret War: The Special Interrogation Group
programme.desc: The SIG consisted of German speaking Jewish volunteers from Palestine. They had a highly dangerous job: which was to pose as Germans behind enemy lines and extract intelligence and do acts of sabotage. Few had a long-life expectancy.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's failed attacks in the Mediterranean region draw in the Germans.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: End Game
programme.desc: In January 1945, Nazi Germany faces defeat as Allied armies close in. Hitler, aged 55 and in poor health, remains defiant in his Berlin bunker. On April 30th, 1945, Hitler commits suicide, and days later, Germany surrenders, ending World War II.

programme.title: Secret War: Agent Garbo
programme.desc: Juan Pujol, MI6's WWII agent "Garbo," created a fictitious spy network in Lisbon, deceiving the Germans with crucial disinformation and influencing their strategies. After the war, MI6 protected him, and he lived in Venezuela until his death in 1988.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Barbarossa Unleashed 1941
programme.desc: E1 begins with a brief examination of the rationale of hatred projected by Hitler onto the Soviet-Slavic-Jewish world. Then it leaps forward, to see Hitler initiate an invasion of the USSR.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The AK-47, the world's deadliest firearm, sparked a Cold War race for superior assault rifles like the American M4 and German HK 416. Host Wil Willis explores its history, from Mikhail Kalashnikov's WWII experiences to its assembly and lethal impact.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Former U.S. Army Ranger Wil Willis tests modern combat shotguns like the Benelli M4 and Mossberg 590, alongside historic models.This documentary features 3D animations and weapon tests to explore effectiveness of combat shotguns.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Grand Mufti
programme.desc: The controversy surrounding Mohammad Amin al-Husayni, stems from his Nazi collaboration. He recruited Bosnian Muslims and advocated for a Palestinian homeland with Nazi help. His diaries reveal awareness of the Holocaust and anti-Semitic sentiments.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: The Final Solution
programme.desc: This is the story of how Hitler orchestrated the genocide of 6 million Jews. Hitler portrayed Jews as a societal threat, using Goebbels' propaganda. Deportations were masked as resettlements while Auschwitz-Birkenau became a death factory.

programme.title: Mata Hari - The Beautiful Spy
programme.desc: Mata Hari. Dance, Seduction and Espionage. The enduring myth.

programme.title: Secret War: Hardy Amies and Operation Ratweek
programme.desc: Operation Ratweek’s existence has always been denied. However WMR has now discovered evidence that it existed and was carried out.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Slovenia: The Crow's Flight
programme.desc: Monty heads to Slovenia to retrace one of the most daring, yet unknown, mass escapes of Allied prisoners during the second world war, made possible only with the help of partisans and locals.

programme.title: Secret War: Double Agent Tricycle
programme.desc: Dusan Popov was almost certainly James Bond. Ian Fleming knew all the stories about him. Popov managed to persuade both the Germans and MI6 to keep him in the style of a millionaire businessman while performing a series of missions against the Nazis.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Time is Blood 1942-5
programme.desc: Episode 2 begins after the desperate German winter of 1941. Yet 1942 began badly for the Soviets, with more vicious Nazi campaigning seeing millions more Russians captured and starved.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: They are iconic weapons: the Tommy Gun, Uzi, and today’s MP5. Invented to break WWI stalemates, the submachine gun revolutionized warfare and culture. Host Wil Willis explores its evolution, firing the Thompson and BAR.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Based on the hit US reality show America's Next Top Model this UK version presented by Lisa Snowdon follows the latest group of hopefuls through their journey to becoming Britain's newest 'Top Model'.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The competition begins. The first photo shoot takes place in the Milton Keynes SnowZone with the girls forced to withstand temperatures as low as minus 5 degrees. Immediatley Lianna feels like an outsider, not getting along with other girls.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls get their makeovers and the inevitable tears and tantrums follow. The girls pair up for a girl on girl photo shoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls learn about cheese cake pin-up and dancing from Britain's own 'Queen of Burlesque' Immodesty Blaize. Two girls recieve harsh criticism from casting director Beth Charkham when faced with the challenge of a commercial set in a swimming pool.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining models learn about ballroom dancing from top ballroom dancer Brendan Cole and Lianna struggles to get it right. Then they do a full dance with music. One girl gets upset when not chosen by the winner to join her for her reward.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls train with personal trainer Chris Mundle. Then straight after training, sweating and smelling, they head to meet top designers. They have a Gothic Bride photo shoot, with most girls struggling to get a good shot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining models undergo a heavy metallic make-up photo shoot with John Swanell. Lisa arrives at the house and the girls have to critique each other, which causes even more fights. A practical joke gets taken the wrong way.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls shoot a thirty second jewellery promotion with top promo director Jason Clifford. Lucy, last years winner, visits the girls and gives them some tips. They have a country life photo shoot and there is a shock at elimination.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: With two people gone the house becomes even more divided. The girls meet Saffron Aldridge, top style expert, who goes through their wardrobes with no mercy. They have a one on one with Lisa and the girls are awe-struck when they meet a famous model.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The four remaining models head to Morocco and Lisa gives them the day off. They are given the challenge of finding an outfit for Lisa. They have their first Moroccan photo shoot and the final three are chosen.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In the finale the three remaining models have their final photo shoot and the final two compete in a catwalk show and one girl is crowned 'Britain's Next Top Model'.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Andi hires a pretty, young babysitter, Sophia (Victoria Justice), to watch the kids, and gets jealous when her daughter, Kate, goes to her instead for advice.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam discovers that the pastor he hired for their wedding was a phony and he and Andi aren't really married, he scrambles to find a way to fix it before she finds out.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam needs to hire a new project manager, Andi accuses Adam of unconscious bias after he only interviews men for the job.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam notices his Dad's increasingly forgetful behavior, he struggles with how to approach him to discuss it.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When the kids won't do their chores, Adam and Andi decide to go on strike too.

programme.title: Man With A Plan

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam takes his kids to work with him for the day, they accidentally give his biggest client lice. Also, Andi feels like a bad mom when she's the only one in the family not to get lice.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi agree on a present-free Valentine's Day, Adam gives the gift he planned for Andi to his mother instead.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi try to get back in their neighbors' good graces after no one shows up to their potluck.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi are caught off guard by unexpected expenses, they each decide to give up a luxury to pay them off.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Morimoto fights a traditionalist chef who fills his dishes with nostalgia.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Meiji Kinenkan is the oldest bridal hall in Japan undergoing an upgrade to celebrate its 50th anniversary. This includes the addition of a Chinese restaurant and its new grand chef.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen stirs up his best yogurt presentation against Challenger Junichi Ito.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Morimoto battles with Challenger Tsuyoshi Kajimoto as they innovate with abalone, a shellfish.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The Iron Chef is called upon to face Miyoko Sakai, a famed Thai food critic who has had the privilege to learn the secrets of royal Thai cuisine straight from the source.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Morimoto faces another traditionalist who is infamous for his temper, his steadfast discipline and his adherence to tradition.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger in this battle of peach is Masanobu Watabe, owner of Le Rameau d'Or in Yokohama, Japan. Watabe runs the entire 22-seat restaurant by himself.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chen's challenger is a man who masters Chaozhou-style Chinese cuisine, an exacting style that is actually able to please the sensitive tastes of customers in Kyoto.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Sakai battles the 'conjurer of garlic,' a chef who embraces the pungent ingredient as real Italians do. Sakai is further challenged to use live squids in the dishes.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Three years after losing to Iron Chef Chen, the Italian restaurant Sabatini demands a rematch, this time sending in the master chef of their Tokyo restaurant.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Led by Tadamichi Ohta, the chef who defeated Sakai, the Ohta faction invades Kitchen Stadium to uphold traditional Japanese cuisine. Fuji is team Ohta's first contender against Morimoto.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: In honor of the Girls' Festival, Kaga invites a challenger from the ancient city of Kamakura, Motohito Kondo, who was trained in Kyoto and is an expert in both tea and sake.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Tasaki is a world champion sommelier who has always dreamed of becoming a famed chef. Chairman Kaga decides to grant him his wish.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The American chef Ron Seigel challenges Iron Chef Sakai in this battle of lobster. Who will emerge victorious?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The first female challenger at Kitchen Stadium, the 26-year-old Kagata defeated Chef Chen. Years later, she returns to fight Chen again with milk-fed veal.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Natto, a Japanese delicacy, is the ingredient of battle for Iron Chef Morimoto and Tatsutoshi Kumamoto.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Kobe is pitted against an unusual chef of Italian cuisine who operates out of his own food cart.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Nagayama was brought in to revive the venerated Tokyo University restaurant Shochiku and now he will fight against an Iron Chef.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: When it comes to Bok Choy, you know that Iron Chef Chen will be there to defend his honor against Hisao Yaginuma.

programme.desc: Kanalen som viser det beste innen tennis døgnet rundt. Kos deg med hundrevis av timer med direktesendte kamper, høydepunkter og dokumentarer. Her viser vi også eksklusivt innhold som bringer fansen nærmere sporten enn noensinne.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Arthur bought his Cyclone new in 1967. Then, his father put 400,000 miles on it. Now, he wants FantomWorks to make it better than new. Antonio and his cousin Andres challenge Dan to build the fastest Mustang CS in Mexico.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Chris wants the 1950 F1 Truck he remembers from high school and Dean wants the 1968 Lincoln Continental he drove with his dad.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: David and Chuck want their family heirloom 1961 International Harvester Metro Van converted into a state-of-the-art restomod, with all the trimmings. David asks Dan to find and restore a very specific car he’s always wanted: a 1966 Lincoln Convertible.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: 67 Hemi GTX Convertible Resurrected
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Sean asks Dan to find a 1969 Camaro that can be built into the custom restomod of his dreams. Jeff wants to give his 1969 Cutlass a rare Hurst makeover, but the engine has never run and there are more parts in boxes than on the car.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Bo put his 1970 Corvette into storage thirty years ago. Dan discovers that the car needs repair of decades old vandalism. Steve’s 1964 GTO was smashed in an accident. Dan agrees to try and bring his mangled GTO back from beyond the grave.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Dude, Where's Allysa's Car?
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Jerry shows up with a car in pieces, a U-Haul full of parts and a dream of a perfect Plymouth Business Coupe that desperately needs Dan’s help. Bill asks Dan to find him a 1972 Gran Sport and to restore it with hard-to-find features.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Kansas City Royals pitcher Tim Collins wants a ‘super-fast’ 1968 Mustang, but Dan has to first undo a nightmare combination of bad repairs and unsafe systems. Bob needs a FantomWorks reality check to get his beloved 1950 Willy’s Jeep back on the road.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Charles wants Dan to find him a 1967 Corvette with a set-up that’s rare as hen’s teeth. Bob’s 1973 Cuda has been stored for most of its life – but even in storage time takes a heavy toll.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Emmett believes his 1964 Barracuda is all original. But Dan finds out that the car has hidden damage and a past that nobody expected. Velvet wants Dan to get her 1953 Studebaker Commander running as a surprise for her husband, Travis.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Walter loves the fast and futuristic look of his 1975 Bricklin. Unfortunately, the car drives like something from the dark ages. Dan restores a 1963 Split Window Corvette for a pair of owners who know him well – his Uncle Carl and Aunt Claire.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and team at Muscle Cars of Texas go under the hood of the 69 Malibu. The 63 Z06 factory race car, you have to see what it takes to make this race car look like it came out of the factory. Tagging and bagging time on the 72 Corvette.

programme.title: The Ride Life
programme.desc: Sung's dive into the world's car cultures takes him to Poland, a country that emerged from a repressive communist era. Sung finds that new freedoms have led to an explosion of optimist and energy, and one of the most exciting experiences of his life.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team at Muscle Cars of Texas are working in the paint booth on the Malicious Intent. The 1966 Mustang is sanding out the car to get it ready for the paint booth. The 86 Camaro is being converted into a sniper system under the hood.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Mickey’s 1970 Chevelle is perfect, but he wants FantomWorks to tear it apart and upgrade everything to make it his own. Thom’s 1963 Studebaker is a project car with a nightmare combination of leaks, bad parts and a rusted-out floor held together by glue.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team at Muscle Cars of Texas work on gluing the front panel on the 442 Restomod. This 67 Mercury Cougar has some issues with the rear brake pads.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team at Muscle Cars of Texas take you on a tour of what is happening in the shop. Replacing the front end of a 64 Corvette resto mod. Painting racing stripes on a 67 442 convertible. A yellow Camaro underneath the hood of this car.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Daytona vs. Hellcat
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: What We Do for a Buck
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.
programme.sub-title: What We Do for a Buck

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Michael wants a new convertible top for his 1953 Morgan, but the Fantomworks team has no reference, no template and no anchor points. Butch entrusted his 1969 Camaro to a restoration rip-off artist. Can Fantomworks fix the worst work they’ve ever seen?

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 er den nye hurtige og spennende versjonen av spillet! Kom og se ukentlige konkurranser, arkiv spill, studio segmenter og mye mer.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker legends compete in a one-day spectacular at Connexin Live, Hull. Groups A and B, Stephen Hendry vs Tony Drago and Barry Pinches vs Igor Figueiredo.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.
